content: A bright futuristic classroom or science museum learning lab filled with school-age children interacting with large mixed-reality holograms, cinematic ultra-detailed photorealism. The scene is a wide-angle interior during warm late-afternoon sunlight, with floor-to-ceiling glass windows, modern tables, bookshelves, digital displays, and a clean high-tech educational atmosphere. About 9 children and 1 adult teacher are spread across the room, actively exploring science exhibits with gestures and touch interactions. In the center, a glowing semi-transparent holographic human heart floats at chest height while 3 children gather around it, reaching toward it in curiosity. Suspended overhead is a large holographic solar system mobile with exactly 9 planets orbiting a bright sun, with luminous orbit trails and a magical scientific visualization style. On the left side, one child interacts with a tall vertical holographic DNA double helix. On the front-left table, there is a circular tabletop hologram of a miniature mountain-and-river ecosystem containing exactly 4 visible animals: an elephant, a deer, a llama or alpaca, and a bear. On the back-left table, there is a circular holographic architectural city model featuring a grand classical domed building and surrounding structures. On the right-front table, there is a large ball-and-stick molecular model made of glowing spheres and rods. In the mid-right and upper-right space, include additional floating science holograms: exactly 2 geometric polyhedra, exactly 2 molecule diagrams, exactly 2 spherical energy or data globes, and 1 hourglass-like abstract hologram. The children should be ethnically diverse, dressed casually, engaged, amazed, collaborative, and looking at different holographic subjects. Use soft volumetric sunlight, realistic reflections on glass and tabletops, subtle blue and gold glow from the holograms, shallow atmospheric haze, and a premium inspirational STEM-education advertisement aesthetic.
title: Futuristic STEM Classroom with Holograms
description: This prompt generates a cinematic photorealistic classroom scene of children exploring immersive holographic science exhibits, ideal for STEM education campaigns, concept art, or innovation marketing.

content: A stark black-and-white editorial anti-tech poster on an off-white background, designed like a modern brutalist magazine cover about digital addiction. The composition is vertical and highly typographic, with one central surreal image and multiple blocks of small text. At the top center, huge bold condensed sans-serif text reads DOOM on one line and SCROLLING below it, with the word SCROLLING stretched across the page and partially motion-blurred or smeared horizontally. In the upper left corner, a tiny text block reads “SCROLL. SWIPE. NOTHING CHANGES.” with a short horizontal line above it. In the upper right corner, small text reads “24 / 7 / 365” above “THE FEED NEVER ENDS” with a horizontal divider line below. On the left side under the title, add a definition paragraph in small editorial text: “the act of spending an excessive amount of time scrolling through negative or distressing content online, often leading to feelings of anxiety, helplessness, and fatigue.” Beneath that, include 2 short horizontal divider lines, then a large statistic reading “67%” followed by smaller text: “OF PEOPLE AGED 18–24 SAY THEY SCROLL MORE THAN THEY INTEND TO. — PEW RESEARCH, 2023”. Below that, another statement reads “MORE SCROLLING. LESS LIVING.” with a divider line beneath. The center of the poster features a glossy black smartphone standing vertically at the bottom center, seen front-on, with the bottom speaker holes and charging port visible. Emerging from the phone screen is a long impossible staircase receding upward into a narrow tunnel made of repeated translucent vertical panels, creating a claustrophobic corridor. Within the tunnel, a giant grayscale human eye appears in the upper half, partially obscured by haze, vertical slicing, and ghosted repetitions, as if trapped inside the feed. The central image should feel eerie, dreamlike, oppressive, and cinematic, with soft fog, high contrast, photocopy grain, subtle motion smear, and layered transparency. Along the right side of the central image, add a narrow vertical numbered index with exactly 24 visible entries: 001, 002, 003, 004, 005, 007, 008, 009, 010, 011, 012, 013, 014, 015, 017, 018, 019, 020, 021, 022, 024, 025, 026, and an ellipsis, plus a thin downward arrow underneath. In the right column, add a text block titled “DESIGNED TO KEEP YOU HOOKED.” followed by 4 short lines: “Infinite feeds. Unpredicted rewards. Endless comparison. It’s not a glitch— it’s the business model.” Below that place a simple eye/globe icon, then a black rectangular box containing the message: “AWARENESS IS THE FIRST STEP: PUT THE PHONE DOWN. LOOK UP. RECLAIM YOUR TIME.” On the lower left, place a massive cropped black word fragment reading END near the bottom edge, with another stacked statement beside it: “THE MORE YOU SCROLL, THE LESS YOU LIVE.” Add tiny vertical microtext near the left margin for editorial flavor. Across the bottom footer, place 4 icon/text groups: a globe icon, an eye icon, a small warning text block reading “WARNING: EXCESSIVE SCREEN TIME CAN IMPACT YOUR MENTAL HEALTH, SLEEP, AND PRODUCTIVITY.”, an expand-corners icon, a barcode, and a final statement on the far right reading “STAY PRESENT. LIVE IN REAL LIFE.” Use minimalist Swiss-grid alignment, generous negative space, sharp black typography, subtle distressed print texture, and a high-fashion poster aesthetic.
title: Doomscrolling Editorial Poster
description: A monochrome brutalist poster about social media addiction, ideal for awareness campaigns, magazine-style graphics, or conceptual editorial art.

content:
A bold editorial poster in a brutalist Swiss-modern infographic style on a light warm-gray background, portrait orientation, with a split composition: oversized typography dominating the left half and a blurred monochrome human face dominating the right half. The main headline is stacked in huge condensed sans-serif uppercase text reading {argument name="headline text" default="SHORT-FORM ATTENTION TAX"}, with “SHORT-FORM” in black and “ATTENTION TAX” in vivid red-orange. Along the far left margin place a small vertical year mark reading “-2024”. At the top left add tiny uppercase text “YOUR ATTENTION. THEIR ECONOMY.” and at the top right add tiny uppercase text “TIME IS LIMITED. ATTENTION ISN’T.” with small plus-sign registration marks near the corners. Beneath the headline on the left, add the subheading “A hidden cost extracted every time you scroll.”

Create 3 numbered information blocks stacked down the lower left side, each marked by a vertical red-orange bar and large black numerals: section 01 titled “WHAT IS IT?”, section 02 titled “WHY DOES IT EXIST?”, and section 03 titled “HOW IT AFFECTS BEHAVIOR”. Under section 01, include body text explaining that the Short-Form Attention Tax is the invisible price paid for consuming endless short-form content and that it is measured in seconds, minutes, and mental energy extracted by platforms designed to keep you scrolling. Under section 02, include body text explaining that platforms compete for attention because attention, data, and profit are linked, and that short-form content is optimized to be instantly rewarding, infinitely scrollable, and hard to stop. Under section 03, include exactly 6 bullet points in red-orange dash style: “Shortens attention span”, “Reduces deep focus”, “Increases impulsive behavior”, “Disrupts memory & learning”, “Drives comparison & anxiety”, and “Creates compulsive usage loops”, followed by a short concluding sentence about reshaping how you think, feel, and act.

In the center-left and lower-middle areas, add supporting editorial typography in mixed sizes: “Attention is the most valuable currency of the 21st century.” with the word “currency” in red-orange; a small stat block saying “THE AVERAGE PERSON SPENDS 90+ MINUTES DAILY ON SHORT-FORM VIDEO APPS.” with “90+ MINUTES” in red-orange; a giant stacked numeric statement reading “16 DAYS” in black with the surrounding text “THAT’S OVER” above and “A YEAR.” below; and a small closing line “TAX AVOIDANCE STARTS WITH AWARENESS.”

On the right half, show a close-up portrait of a human face in black and white, partially cropped, looking forward, with a serious neutral expression. Apply heavy horizontal motion blur, digital smear, scanline-like streaks, and glitch bars crossing the face, especially across the forehead, nose, and mouth. Overlay exactly 5 vertical social-media style interface icons near the center-right of the face: a white circle/profile dot, a red-orange heart, a white speech bubble, a white bookmark ribbon, and a white share arrow. Add a large translucent red-orange circle covering the lower-right part of the face. Include subtle HUD-like graphic elements: a faint circular reticle with a small red-orange triangular wedge near the upper right, a thin vertical measurement scale near the far right edge, a few white square markers, small black and white horizontal bars, and scattered tiny plus signs for layout texture.

At the bottom, place a barcode on the left with tiny coordinate-like text above it, then 3 footer callouts spaced across the width: “PROTECT YOUR ATTENTION. PROTECT YOUR LIFE.”, “BE MINDFUL. BE INTENTIONAL. BE FREE.”, and “RECLAIM FOCUS. RECLAIM TIME. RECLAIM YOU.” Use a restrained palette of black, off-white, and red-orange only. The overall look should feel like a high-end social critique poster, mixing typographic activism, data editorial design, and dystopian tech-noise portraiture, with crisp layout, strong negative space, and print-poster realism.
title: Short-Form Attention Tax Poster
description: A high-contrast editorial infographic poster about the hidden cognitive cost of short-form media, suitable for awareness campaigns, social commentary, or magazine-style design.

content: Create a square 1:1 macro photography image of an open antique history book on a clean white background, styled like an edible history pop-up book. The book is thick, vintage, leather-bound, and lying open flat at 180 degrees. Its pages are aged parchment with yellowed paper, worn edges, and visible paper texture. On the left page, show an abundant, slightly messy cocoa harvest spread partially covering the printed text: exactly 5 whole or split cacao pods in deep red-orange and brown tones, 1 wooden bowl filled with cacao nibs, a large scatter of loose cacao beans, broken cacao shells, small piles of nibs, and several glossy green leaves tucked among the ingredients. Everything should feel organic, overflowing, and tactile. On the right page, create a large 3D pop-up sculpture of assorted Swiss chocolate built entirely from chocolate and confectionery materials: exactly 8 visible chocolate bars or bar segments in mixed dark, milk, and white chocolate, arranged in a bouquet-like upright structure with 5 large leaf-shaped cacao or chocolate leaves behind them, curled pale chocolate shavings at the base, scattered cacao crumbs, and a wrapped paper base with a vintage label reading “CHOCOLAT SUISSE” and smaller text “Maison de Qualité”. Beside it, place a tiny 1:35 scale Victorian-era chocolatier gentleman in an apron, actively presenting and adjusting the chocolate display with both hands. Print on the right page in bold black serif text: “Vevey, 1875”. Below that, include a short faded cursive lore paragraph about cacao and Swiss chocolate culture. The paragraph should read: “From the cacao pod’s humble shell emerges a confection of elegance. In Swiss chocolate houses, cacao is refined into a treasured delicacy, shared in salons and homes alike, prized for comfort, celebration, and the craft of sweet invention.” Lighting is soft, warm museum lighting focused at the center of the open book. Mood is educational, whimsical, and richly textural. Emphasize photorealism, shallow depth of field, miniature world aesthetic, premium editorial styling, and extremely high material texture fidelity.
title: Edible History Pop-Up Chocolate Book
description: A photoreal macro editorial image of an antique open book transformed into a whimsical cocoa-and-Swiss-chocolate pop-up scene, ideal for food storytelling, historical campaigns, and premium generative art comparisons.

content:
A clean premium food advertisement poster on a light gray-white studio background, featuring {argument name="fruit name" default="tomatoes"} as the hero subject. In the center, show exactly 7 tomato pieces arranged on a shallow round wooden plate: 5 whole ripe red tomatoes stacked in a natural pyramid, 1 halved tomato standing upright at the front center with glossy flesh and visible seeds, and 1 wedge slice placed at the lower right foreground. The tomatoes are fresh, vivid red, covered with realistic water droplets, with green stems attached to most whole fruits. Add a few green leaves and two small yellow tomato blossoms near the lower right edge for freshness accents. Use soft commercial lighting, gentle shadows, sharp focus, and highly realistic texture, in a polished supermarket-poster style.

Design the layout as a Chinese nutrition and freshness infographic poster. In the upper left, place a large two-line Chinese headline with strong typographic hierarchy: the first line in black reads {argument name="headline line 1" default="自然成熟"}, the second line in large warm red reads {argument name="headline line 2" default="营养美味"}. Below it, add a smaller gray Chinese slogan: {argument name="slogan text" default="每一口都是大自然的馈赠"}. Under the slogan, place exactly 3 simple red line icons in a horizontal row with short Chinese labels and gray sublabels beneath each: 1) a sun icon with text "充足日照" and subtext "自然成熟", 2) a sprout or leaf icon with text "科学种植" and subtext "健康美味", 3) a heart outline icon with text "新鲜采摘" and subtext "产地直供".

On the right side, create a thin curved red guide line framing the tomatoes, with exactly 4 circular nutrient callouts stacked vertically from top to bottom. Each callout is a red or red-orange gradient circle with a white symbol or letter inside, connected to the curve. Use these Chinese labels and explanatory text: 1) top callout with "C" and title "富含维生素C", description "有助于增强免疫力 促进胶原蛋白合成"; 2) second callout with a molecular icon and title "番茄红素", description "强效抗氧化剂 有助于抵御自由基"; 3) third callout with a leaf icon and title "膳食纤维", description "促进肠道蠕动 帮助消化"; 4) bottom callout with "K" and title "钾元素", description "有助于维持 心脏健康".

On the left lower side of the tomatoes, add exactly 2 red text feature callouts with fine red leader lines: the upper one titled "美味多汁" with smaller gray text "果肉饱满，汁水丰富 酸甜可口，回味无穷"; the lower one titled "新鲜采摘" with smaller gray text "人工精选，严格挑选 确保每一颗都新鲜优质".

Across the bottom, place a rounded rectangular nutrition table bar in white with light gray dividers. On the left end, add a solid red rounded label block containing the Chinese title {argument name="table title" default="营养成分表（每100g含量）"}. To its right, show exactly 6 nutrient columns with gray headings and darker values beneath: "能量" "20kcal"; "蛋白质" "0.9g"; "脂肪" "0.2g"; "碳水化合物" "4.2g"; "维生素C" "14mg"; "钾" "179mg". Center a tiny gray footnote below the table: "* 数据来源于《中国食物成分表》". Overall style: elegant Chinese fresh-produce marketing poster, balanced whitespace, red-accented infographic design, realistic product photography blended with clean vector UI elements.
title: Chinese Tomato Nutrition Poster
description: A polished Chinese produce advertisement showing fresh tomatoes with nutritional callouts and a bottom nutrition table, ideal for grocery, packaging, or food marketing visuals.

content: Create a clean, symmetrical Chinese feng shui infographic poster in a traditional almanac style on a warm light beige background. The main title at the top is large dark red Chinese calligraphy text reading {argument name="headline text" default="2026年九宫飞星图"}, with a smaller subtitle beneath in black reading {argument name="subtitle text" default="（丙午年）"}. Add a decorative compass rose in the upper left corner labeled with the four cardinal directions in Chinese: 南 at top, 北 at bottom, 东 at left, 西 at right. Center the composition around a 3x3 grid of 9 bordered square panels with thin ornamental Chinese-style corners, evenly spaced and perfectly aligned. Each square contains a large colored number, a Chinese star name, one line beginning with 吉星 or 凶星, and an illustrative symbolic object. Top row has 3 panels: top-left labeled 东南 with a purple-framed panel for number 9 and text 九紫右弼星, plus 吉星: 喜庆、姻缘、贵人, illustrated with purple balloons, a gift box, and a small firework burst; top-center labeled 正南 with an orange-framed panel for number 5 and text 五黄廉贞星, plus 凶星: 灾祸、意外、疾病, illustrated with a gold gourd and ancient Chinese coins tied with a red tassel; top-right labeled 西南 with a gold-framed panel for number 7 and text 七赤破军星, plus 凶星: 破财、口舌、盗贼, illustrated with a brass bell and a silver sword. Middle row has 3 panels: middle-left aligned with 正东 in large vertical side text, a green-framed panel for number 8 and text 八白左辅星, plus 吉星: 财运、置业、积蓄, illustrated with a bonsai-like money tree and gold ingots; middle-center labeled 中宫 in a blue capsule tag overlapping the top edge of the center square, a blue-framed panel for number 1 and text 一白贪狼星, plus 吉星: 人缘、感情、智慧, illustrated with a crystal ball on a wooden stand; middle-right aligned with 正西 in large vertical side text, a green-framed panel for number 3 and text 三碧禄存星, plus 凶星: 是非、口舌、争执, illustrated with bamboo and a small stacked rock fountain. Bottom row has 3 panels: bottom-left labeled 东北 with a green-framed panel for number 4 and text 四绿文曲星, plus 吉星: 学业、文昌、考试, illustrated with an open book, brush pen, and ink stone with bamboo leaves behind; bottom-center labeled 正北 with a gold-framed panel for number 6 and text 六白武曲星, plus 吉星: 权力、贵人、偏财, illustrated with a golden guardian lion statue on a pedestal holding a ball; bottom-right labeled 西北 with a gray-framed panel for number 2 and text 二黑巨门星, plus 凶星: 病痛、伤害、阻滞, illustrated with a stone pagoda and a small incense burner. Use exactly 6 outer direction labels around the grid: 东南, 正南, 西南 above the top row, and 东北, 正北, 西北 below the bottom row, each inside rounded capsules matching the panel colors. Add exactly 2 large vertical side direction labels outside the grid: 正东 on the left side and 正西 on the right side. At the bottom center, add a pill-shaped legend with 2 segments: a red segment reading 吉星: 1、4、6、8、9 and a dark gray segment reading 凶星: 2、3、5、7. Include faint pale cloud motifs behind some objects for traditional atmosphere. Style is crisp vector-infographic with soft watercolor-like object rendering, high readability, balanced spacing, and an elegant Chinese metaphysical chart aesthetic.

content: A clean editorial-style illustration on a light gray-white background showing exactly 11 young people gathered around a huge sheet of paper on the floor, collaboratively drawing a detailed Japan travel scene. The composition is viewed from slightly above, centered on the artwork, with the people forming a loose ring around it. Use a simple hand-drawn cartoon style with thin black outlines, soft muted colors, minimal shading, and a friendly modern magazine aesthetic. The central drawing on the paper includes 8 distinct scenic elements: snow-capped Mount Fuji in the middle background, a red sun to the upper right of the mountain, a few white clouds, pink cherry blossoms on a dark branch at upper left, a red multi-tier pagoda on the right, a tall city skyline with a tower near the center-right, a blue lake with a small boat, and a sleek white bullet train curving across the lower right. Add trees and bushes throughout, plus a small arched bridge near the lower middle. The 11 people are casually dressed in varied outfits and are all holding markers or crayons while leaning, kneeling, or lying around the paper. Include 6 people across the top edge, 3 along the left side, and 2 along the lower-right side. Their clothing should vary: hoodies, jackets, a knit beanie, a plaid shirt, a patterned sweater, a blue T-shirt, a black T-shirt, and one person in a red cardigan over dark clothes. One person on the right should wear glasses and a red cardigan, another at the bottom right should have curly dark hair, round glasses, a black T-shirt, and be lying on his stomach while drawing. Scatter a few loose crayons in blue and dark colors near the bottom edge of the paper. Keep the mood collaborative, creative, and playful, with the large illustrated poster as the clear focal point.

description: This prompt generates a soft cartoon editorial scene of 11 people collaboratively sketching a detailed Japan-themed landscape poster, suitable for articles about teamwork, AI creativity, design, or collaborative creation.

content: Create a highly detailed vintage-inspired illustrated travel poster and infographic for {argument name="country name" default="Switzerland"}, shown as a sculpted 3D relief map centered on a clean light gray background. At the top, place a huge bold black sans-serif title reading {argument name="headline text" default="SWITZERLAND"}, with smaller uppercase text below reading TRAVEL GUIDE, flanked by thin horizontal divider lines and a tiny red shield emblem with a white cross. The centerpiece is a raised topographic map of Switzerland rendered like a miniature diorama, with rocky borders, green valleys, snowy alpine peaks, blue lakes, winding white roads, and a few rail lines. Mark exactly 12 destinations on the map with black dot markers and bold black capsule labels with white uppercase text: BASEL, ZÜRICH, ST. GALLEN, LUCERNE, BERN, INTERLAKEN, CHUR, ST. MORITZ, LUGANO, ZERMATT, GENEVA, and LAUSANNE. Integrate miniature landmark buildings and scenery directly onto the map, including churches, old town towers, waterfront structures, castles, and mountain villages, plus two small red trains moving through the landscape. Add surrounding travel ephemera arranged around the map: 1 worn brown vintage suitcase with travel stickers and a red Swiss-cross badge in the upper left, 1 antique brass compass rose on the left, 1 postage stamp in the upper right reading TRAVEL TO SWITZERLAND with mountain art and postal cancellation marks, 1 realistic Swiss flag on a pole in the top right corner, 1 tilted polaroid photo in the lower left with snowy mountains and the caption {argument name="photo caption" default="Swiss Alps"}, and 4 faceted heart-shaped crystal charms total, with 2 clear/silver hearts and 2 red hearts placed around the composition. On the right side, add a vertical sightseeing list with icon illustrations and thin separators, containing exactly 12 city entries with headings and short attraction lines: ZÜRICH — Bahnhofstrasse; Old Town (Altstadt); Lake Zurich. LUCERNE — Chapel Bridge; Lion Monument; Lake Lucerne. INTERLAKEN — Jungfraujoch; Harder Kulm; Lake Brienz & Thun. ZERMATT — Matterhorn; Gornergrat Railway; Skiing & Hiking. GENEVA — Jet d'Eau; United Nations; Lake Geneva. LAUSANNE — Olympic Museum; Lausanne Cathedral; Lake Geneva. BERN — Federal Palace; Zytglogge Clock Tower; Bear Park. ST. MORITZ — St. Moritz Lake; Skiing; Luxury Shopping. LUGANO — Lake Lugano; Monte Brè; Swiss-Italian Culture. ST. GALLEN — Abbey Library; St. Gallen Cathedral; Textile Museum. CHUR — Old Town; Bishop's Palace; Rhine Valley. BASEL — Kunstmuseum; Basel Minster; Rhine River. Use a premium editorial travel-brand aesthetic, combining realistic miniature map rendering, crisp typography, soft studio shadows, subtle drop shadows under objects, and a polished tourism campaign look.

content: A cute horizontal educational infographic in a hand-drawn scrapbook style on a pastel desk-and-paper collage background, explaining Chinese word segmentation with byte-level BPE. The scene is divided into 3 clearly separated instructional sections arranged from left to right across a wide banner. On the far left stands a chibi Shiba Inu mascot, {argument name="character name" default="柴小七"}, with warm tan and cream fur, round face, small triangular ears, rosy cheeks, and a curious expression, holding a cup and standing beside a small desk with drawers, pencils, and a chair. Above the dog is a bold rounded white title box with black Chinese text: {argument name="headline text" default="中文分词：Byte-level BPE（BBPE）流程科普"}. In the first teaching section near the upper middle, show 4 small translucent blue token-shaped tiles lined up on a wooden shelf, each labeled “Token”, with a curved arrow and small handwritten Chinese note “词频语料统计” pointing toward the next step. In the second section, place a large magnifying glass highlighting 3 small frequency tiles labeled exactly “E7”, “94”, and “B5”, with the section label in a yellow note reading “2. 频率统计与合并”; beneath and inside the magnified area include a large black Chinese character “电”, and nearby a handwritten note “频繁字节对”. In the third section at lower middle-left, add a wooden sign and a larger merged translucent blue token tile labeled “Token”, with a small yellow note reading “3. 跨字合并”, large black Chinese text “我们→”, and a caption strip below that says “高频词组合并为 Token”. On the far right, show the final explanatory result with 3 small byte boxes labeled “E7”, “94”, and “B5” above a large black Chinese character “电”, then a note card reading “1. 字节级编码（UTF-8）”, and below that the large black Chinese word “我们”. Connect the sections with curved arrows in pink, blue, and green to show process flow. Include 1 animated blue token mascot with tiny arms and legs near the center-bottom, smiling and waving. Use soft cream, pink, beige, and light blue colors, thick clean outlines, sticker-like cutout shapes, taped paper corners, notebook textures, pencils around the edges, and a friendly hand-account illustration style suitable for a science explainer graphic.
title: Scrapbook Byte-level BPE Explainer
description: This prompt generates a wide hand-drawn educational infographic with cute mascot characters to explain byte-level BPE tokenization in a friendly Chinese science-pop style.

content: A cute hand-drawn scrapbook-style horizontal educational infographic in Chinese on a warm beige paper background with rounded borders, pastel doodles, tape stickers, tiny stars, and a classroom-notebook aesthetic. The top center has a large headline in playful handwritten Chinese: "什么是分词？" with the second half in coral pink and the rest in dark brown. On the upper left, a chibi Shiba Inu teacher character stands facing forward, wearing a pale yellow shirt and blue necktie, holding a pointer stick upward, with a speech bubble that says "今天来学习分词(Tokenization)!". On the upper right, a cute blue square token mascot labeled "TOKEN" sits smiling, with blush cheeks, tiny legs and arms, and a magnifying glass; next to it is a speech bubble saying "我是 Token！被切得越合理，模型越聪明！". Near the right edge, add a small hanging notepad card reading "知识点 收藏夹" with a heart icon. Beneath the headline, place a rounded dashed text box containing the definition: "分词是将人类可读的文本切分成 Token 的过程。" with the word "Token" highlighted in blue. Below that, add a line of explanatory text: "下面以 “程序员Left” 和 “人工智能” 为例，看看不同的分词方式：" with "程序员Left" highlighted in light blue and "人工智能" highlighted in pink. The lower half contains exactly 4 rounded pastel panels arranged left to right, each with a numbered badge and title. Panel 1 is mint green and titled "1 词级分词". It includes the subtitle "按完整语义划分文本" and exactly 3 token bubbles: "程序员", "Left", "人工智能". At the bottom of this panel, show the Shiba Inu teacher giving a thumbs up with a speech bubble saying "语义完整，容易理解！". Panel 2 is pale yellow and titled "2 字符级分词". It includes the subtitle "逐字切分文本" and exactly 9 circular token bubbles arranged in rows: "程", "序", "员", "L", "e", "f", "t", "人", "工", "智", "能"—visually presented as individual characters from the example text, in a compact grid. At the bottom, show the blue token mascot holding a pencil, with a speech bubble saying "粒度最细，但序列会很长~". Panel 3 is pale pink and titled "3 子词分词". It includes the subtitle "按词根以及前后缀划分" and exactly 5 token bubbles: "程序", "员", "Left", "人工", "智能". At the bottom, show the Shiba Inu teacher thinking with one paw at its mouth and a question mark above the head, with a speech bubble saying "折中方案，效果 often 很好！". Panel 4 is pale blue and titled "4 字节级分词". It includes the subtitle "将字词转为字节编码，根据转换后的内容进行组合和划分" and displays exactly 14 small circular code bubbles: "E7", "A8", "8B", "...", "66", "74", "E4", "BA", "BA", "E8", "83", "BD", "..." arranged in multiple rows like encoded bytes. At the bottom, show the blue token mascot again, smiling, with a speech bubble saying "适合处理任意文本！" and a tiny light bulb doodle nearby. Across the very bottom, place a rounded banner note that reads: "不同分词方式各有优势，实际应用中会根据任务和数据选择合适的方案哦！". Use soft pastel green, yellow, pink, and blue for the four panels, dark brown handwritten text, subtle shadows, rounded shapes, and adorable kawaii expressions throughout. Keep the composition balanced, clean, and friendly, like a polished social-media science explainer poster.
title: Cute Chinese Tokenization Infographic
description: This prompt generates a pastel hand-drawn horizontal Chinese educational infographic explaining four tokenization methods with a Shiba Inu teacher and a blue token mascot, ideal for social media science posts.

content: A clean corporate editorial infographic illustration for a Japanese business article about manufacturing industry challenges, set inside a realistic modern factory with metalworking machines and a cool gray-blue color palette. The composition is split into two thematic halves over a blurred industrial workshop background. At the top center, place a large bold Japanese headline in dark navy text: {argument name="headline text" default="製造業が直面する根深い課題: 「人手不足」と「技術伝承」"}. In the left foreground, show 1 factory worker in a light gray uniform and cap standing with arms crossed, looking concerned; nearby add a circular white icon showing exactly 6 human silhouettes, with 3 filled dark figures and 3 dotted outline figures to symbolize labor shortage. In the right foreground, show exactly 2 factory workers beside a large lathe machine: 1 veteran worker in a navy work jacket and navy cap pointing and demonstrating machine operation, and 1 younger worker in a light gray uniform and cap observing closely. Near them, add a white thought bubble icon containing a navy head silhouette with 2 gear symbols and exactly 3 small Japanese word bubbles reading "経験", "勘", and "コツ". In the center background, include exactly 2 additional workers in light gray uniforms operating machinery, slightly out of focus, for a total of 5 workers visible in the factory scene. Overlay two rounded white information panels with dark navy title tabs. The left panel title is "人手不足" and contains exactly 3 bullet points with blue circular check icons: "若手人材の確保が困難", "現場の負担増大", and "将来の生産性低下への懸念". The right panel title is "技術伝承" and contains exactly 3 bullet points with blue circular check icons: "熟練技術が属人化", "暗黙知が言語化・標準化されていない", and "ベテランの退職による技術の断絶リスク". At the bottom center, place a dark navy rounded rectangular callout box with white Japanese text: {argument name="callout text" default="製造業の持続的な成長のために、これらの課題解決が急務"}. Add exactly 2 large white arrows pointing inward toward this bottom callout, one from the left and one from the right. Style the whole image like a polished consulting-firm presentation visual or business magazine insert: photorealistic workers and machinery, subtle depth of field, high clarity, balanced layout, soft lighting, crisp typography, and a professional Japanese manufacturing-industry infographic aesthetic.
title: Japanese Manufacturing Challenges Infographic
description: A polished Japanese business infographic illustrating labor shortages and skill transfer issues in manufacturing, suitable for articles, presentations, and corporate reports.

content: A vintage hand-drawn Chinese infographic on textured off-white paper with torn deckled edges, printed in a limited two-ink palette of deep purple and bright cyan accents, with halftone shading and poster-like comic line art. The composition compares intuitive manual cooking versus tool-assisted cooking and externalized cognition. On the left, a large adult cook in an apron is dramatically stir-frying in a wok with flames, flying ingredients, smoke swirls, and energetic motion lines; the cook’s face is obscured by a rectangular blur block. Above the head is a glowing brain-like thought bubble containing 3 small icons: a seasoning bottle, a flame, and a timer/clock, with rays radiating outward. At the lower left, a broken chain hangs beside large bold Chinese text reading “全凭手感”. Below the cook, a smaller confused person mixing in a bowl looks worried, surrounded by exactly 4 question marks. In the center, multiple thick arrows point from the cook’s intuition toward a structured cooking workflow. At upper center is large Chinese text “照着做”. Beneath it, a hand holds a smartphone recipe screen showing visible Chinese text including “5克盐” and “中火3分钟”, with a finger tapping the screen. Around the phone are measured cooking tools and ingredients: 2 measuring spoons, 1 measuring cup, 1 digital scale, and 6 small bowls arranged neatly, plus a pot on a stove with steam rising and a finished plated dish nearby. Near the plated dish is Chinese text “七八分” and a 5-star rating row with exactly 4 filled stars and 1 empty star. On the right, show a concept map of externalized cognition around a simple smiling stick-figure cook standing behind a table of food. The node network is connected with cyan lines and includes exactly 6 tool/info nodes: a smart oven at the top, 2 seasoning packets labeled “调料包” and “榨酱包”, 1 clipboard labeled “精准配方”, 1 blender, 1 rice cooker, and 1 recipe note sheet. Centered in this network is large Chinese text “认知外化”. The table in front of the figure holds exactly 5 dishes/bowls/plates of prepared food. Along the bottom is a simplified cognition equation: a large brain icon, then an arrow to a smaller brain icon, then a cluster of external tools/documents including a phone screen, a microwave-like appliance, and 3 paper/manual items, then an equals sign, then a muscular human silhouette with gears inside the torso and an upward arrow near the shoulder. Beneath or beside this equation is bold Chinese text “脑 + 外部工具 = 更强能力”, with the first “脑” also shown separately under the left brain icon. Use expressive sketched arrows, doodle lightning bolts, comic emphasis marks, and a balanced left-to-right flow that visually communicates the transition from pure instinct to repeatable systems and augmented ability.
title: Chinese Cooking Cognition Infographic
description: A retro comic-style Chinese infographic illustrating the shift from intuition-based cooking to recipe-driven, tool-augmented cooking, suitable for articles or social posts about AI, workflows, and externalized cognition.

content:
Create a premium Japanese figure advertisement poster on a clean off-white background with subtle pale gray brushstroke textures and tiny scattered gold flecks. The layout should look like a luxury hobby product introduction page for an original anime/mecha statue. The main centerpiece is a highly detailed 1/7 scale-style figure of {argument name="character name" default="Samurai Mecha Girl"}, a slim teenage anime girl in a dramatic crouching attack pose, turned three-quarters to the viewer, with one knee bent under her body and the other mechanical leg planted forward. She raises a katana overhead with both hands as if about to strike. Her face is intentionally obscured by a soft square blur block. She has long brown hair with loose strands flying outward, a white headband with a small mechanical side ornament, and a navy Japanese sailor school uniform with a cropped long-sleeve top, red neckerchief, short pleated skirt, and exposed midriff. Her arms and legs are mostly robotic: metallic silver-gray mechanical arms with articulated fingers and visible joints, bulky armored mech thighs and calves with realistic pistons, seams, weathering, and small orange caution markings. The sword is a polished katana with a white-and-black wrapped handle and a metallic guard. Render the statue as a realistic painted collectible figure with studio lighting, glossy and matte material contrast, precise shadows, and showroom-grade product photography.

Design the page like a commercial figure brochure with exactly 5 numbered detail callout sections. On the left side, stack 4 rectangular close-up panels vertically, each with a number and Japanese label plus short descriptive body text in Japanese: panel 1 shows a close-up of the face and hair, labeled "01 表情"; panel 2 shows the upper torso and uniform, labeled "02 上半身"; panel 3 shows the raised mechanical arms and sword grip, labeled "03 メカアーム&ソード"; panel 4 shows the mechanical legs, labeled "04 メカレッグ". At the bottom right, add a wider rectangular panel labeled "05 武装・ディテール" showing exactly 2 katana close-up views arranged horizontally, one above the other. Keep all panel images bordered lightly and integrated into the poster layout.

At the upper left, place a large expressive brush-calligraphy title reading {argument name="main title" default="Samurai Mecha Girl"}, with an ink-brush circle motif behind the first word. At the upper right, add a gold minimalist logo and the brand name {argument name="brand name" default="TENNEN"}, with small Japanese tagline text beneath it. Along the right side, place a vertical Japanese promotional slogan in elegant dark text. In the lower left area, include small product specification text in Japanese with exactly these lines of product info styling: scale, product name, sculptor credit, paint credit, brand, and a release date line. Use {argument name="release date" default="2025年12月"} in the schedule area. Along the bottom, add a dark horizontal footer bar with the gold brand logo on the left, the brand name repeated, a short Japanese brand statement in small text across the center, and tiny legal/disclaimer text at the far right. Overall style: high-end Japanese figure marketing sheet, refined editorial composition, realistic collectible statue photography, elegant white-and-gold packaging aesthetic, anime girl fused with hard-surface mecha design, polished and premium.
title: Samurai Mecha Girl Figure Poster
description: A luxury Japanese-style product poster for an original anime mecha-girl figure, ideal for mock collectible figure ads and hobby brand presentation layouts.

content:
Create a premium Japanese plastic model kit product-poster layout on a clean white studio background with subtle gray gradients and a glossy floor reflection. The main subject is a highly detailed anime mecha schoolgirl figure posed dynamically in the center-left, in a wide combat stance, holding a katana horizontally across the frame with one robotic hand gripping the hilt and the other making a peace sign near her face. The character has a blurred face area, short dark navy-blue hair in a tousled bob with small side strands, and gold horn-like mechanical hair ornaments. Her outfit is a fusion of a Japanese high school sailor uniform and hard-surface sci-fi armor: white armored torso with mechanical panel lines, a red sailor neckerchief, a pleated navy skirt, bulky white armored thighs and shins, red and blue accent parts, gold circular joint details, a dark blue waist ribbon or back cloth, and red mechanical backpack-like attachments at the hips and lower back. The katana has a dark blade and a blue-and-gold wrapped handle. Render the figure like a professionally photographed collectible model or action plastic kit, with sharp material definition, realistic molded plastic surfaces, slight satin sheen, and commercial product-shot lighting.

Design the page as a figure advertisement/spec sheet with exactly 1 large hero image and 5 smaller detail panels stacked vertically on the right. The 5 right-side panels must show: 1) close-up of the head and hair ornaments, 2) upper-body torso detail with sailor scarf and chest armor, 3) weapon and articulated hand close-up with the sword near the face, 4) waist attachment and skirt/hip armor detail, 5) leg detail close-up showing joints and armor construction. Include thin blue divider accents around the right-side panel area.

At the top left, place a large Japanese title in bold serif-like characters reading "女子甲生", with the middle character in dark red and the others in dark navy. Beneath it, add a smaller Japanese subtitle line: "— メカ × 少女 × 青春 —". On the upper right, place a sleek logo and brand name reading "{argument name="brand name" default="TENNEN"}" with small Japanese text beneath it. Add a vertical Japanese slogan block on the left side of the hero figure reading "鋼に咲く、乙女の意志。" with the middle phrase in red. Add Japanese captions beneath each of the 5 right-side detail panels: "表情造形", "上半身ディテール", "武装・可動手", "腰部アタッチメント", "脚部ディテール". In the lower left, include a boxed scale label reading "{argument name="scale label" default="1/12 SCALE"}" and nearby English product text reading "FULL ACTION PLASTIC MODEL KIT". Add two small bullet lines in Japanese beneath that: "◆ 塗装済み髪パーツ付属" and "◆ マーキングデカール付属". Across the bottom, add a dark navy footer band with the brand logo and "{argument name="footer brand" default="TENNEN"}" centered, plus small Japanese text below.

Use a polished modern hobby-brand aesthetic, Japanese mecha-girl collectible packaging design, minimal white negative space, crisp typography, balanced editorial layout, and realistic studio-photo rendering of a non-existent original figure. Color palette: white, navy blue, dark blue, red, gray, black, and metallic gold. Aspect ratio 3:4.
title: Japanese Mecha Girl Figure Ad Poster
description: A polished product-poster prompt for generating a fictional anime mecha schoolgirl plastic model kit advertisement with a hero figure and five labeled detail panels.

content: Using REFERENCE_0 as the cast reference, transform the simple lineup into an ornate Japanese light-novel character relationship chart poster. Keep the same 10 named characters and reuse their existing portrait art as the base visuals, but redesign the layout into a polished infographic on a soft cream and pale-blue fantasy background with decorative borders, sparkles, roses, and a small European-style hotel building vignette in the upper left. Add a large Japanese title at the top, 「支配人はかりそめの顔」, with the subtitle 「キャラクター紹介＆相関図」, and place a dark badge in the upper right that says 「ネタバレ配慮版」. Put the heroine 一条 紬希 in the center as the main focus in a framed character card labeled 「主人公」, and place 秦野 啓司 in a large framed card on the right as the key counterpart. Arrange the remaining 8 characters around them in individual profile cards: 加賀坂 その葉, 川原 澪, 樫村, 紬希の母, ハルカ, 杏子, 美果, 桜子. Connect the characters with multiple colored arrows and relationship labels to visualize the network; include exactly 14 visible relationship labels: 「親友」, 「理解者」, 「本音を見抜く」, 「憧れ」, 「相談」, 「画策」, 「仲直り中」, 「直感的理解」, 「メンター」, 「実務支援」, 「保護者的存在」, 「後輩　ムードメーカー」, 「後輩　グループを支える」, 「後輩　明るさ・希望」. Also add the 8 central horizontal relationship callouts between 一条 紬希 and 秦野 啓司: 「偽溶み→公認」, 「ライバル」, 「秘密を共有」, 「対等な相棒」, 「気になる存在」, plus a pink central badge reading 「反発から信頼へ」, and 3 lower callouts: 「信頼」, 「協力を後押し」, 「二人の空気に気づく」. Include a gold-ribbon group label above the three lower girls that says 「ASTRALの仲間たち」. Add a bottom section with exactly 10 smaller summary cards, one for each character again, lined up across the width. On the far right, add 2 boxed sidebar sections titled 「作品のキーワード」 and 「関係の見どころ」; the first should contain 4 bullet items with icons, and the second should contain 4 bullet items with icons. Fill every card with dense Japanese profile text and role tags in a clean editorial style, as if for a promotional relationship guide included with a novel. Make the overall design elegant, readable, romantic-mystery themed, and magazine-quality.

content: A highly detailed, colorful illustrated hidden-object poster set in Madrid’s Puerta del Sol on a bright sunny day, rendered like a lively hand-drawn travel puzzle with crisp ink outlines, textured watercolor-gouache shading, and a slightly whimsical caricature style. The composition is packed edge to edge with a huge crowd in the plaza, viewed from a slightly elevated eye level, with the Real Casa de Correos clock building dominating the right background, the Tío Pepe rooftop sign in the left background, the red diamond Sol metro sign on the left, the bear and strawberry tree statue near the center, historic facades, blue sky, and soft clouds. At the top left, include a torn notebook-paper sign pinned over the scene with large Spanish text: {argument name="headline text" default="¿Dónde está \"El Hombre del Puro\"?"} and a second line {argument name="subheadline text" default="Encuéntralo en Madrid"}. Next to it, add a pinned small portrait photo of the target man: a middle-aged man in a dark fedora and dark coat holding a cigar near his mouth, styled like a reference snapshot. Fill the square with exactly 1 metro entrance sign, 1 lottery kiosk labeled “Loterías y Apuestas del Estado,” 1 domed souvenir kiosk with postcard display and a sign reading “¡HOLA! DESDE MADRID,” 1 churros stand with a chalkboard reading “CHURROS CON CHOCOLATE,” 1 hat display stall on the lower right, 1 guitarist, 2 flamenco dancers in red dresses, 1 street cleaner in a bright orange-and-green uniform with text on the back reading “MADRID LIMPIO ENTRE TODOS,” 1 bicyclist, 2 dogs, 1 child holding a red teddy-bear balloon, many pigeons scattered across the foreground, children playing with soap bubbles, tourists with backpacks and maps, families, street onlookers, and performers. The crowd should feel dense and bustling, with dozens of distinct figures in varied summer clothing and natural poses, creating a challenging search scene. Emphasize Spanish local color, playful observational details, warm oranges and sunlit stone grays, and the feeling of a classic “Where’s Waldo?” style city-search illustration centered on finding {argument name="target character" default="El Hombre del Puro"} somewhere among the crowd in {argument name="city" default="Madrid"}.
title: Hidden-Object Madrid Plaza Puzzle
description: This prompt generates a busy illustrated search-and-find poster of Puerta del Sol in Madrid, ideal for hidden-object games, social posts, or travel-themed puzzle art.

content: Create a highly detailed, colorful isometric festival poster illustration of a bustling Latin American technology fair in an open urban plaza, packed with dozens of people networking, coding, presenting, eating, recording media, and attending talks. The overall style should feel like a premium editorial cityscape poster: vibrant, dense, optimistic, playful, and full of readable signage, with crisp linework, painterly textures, warm sunlight, and a celebratory startup-community atmosphere. The main headline on the large stage at upper left reads {argument name="headline text" default="LATAM TECH FEST"}, with a subheading in Spanish reading "Aprender para transformar". On the stage, show a live conference with blue lighting, a presenter, and a seated audience; include 4 vertical icon panels on the stage area labeled "Educación", "Tecnología", "Innovación", and "Futuro", plus 3 glowing topic icons on the back wall labeled "Código", "Comunidad", and "Impacto". Build the plaza as a dense multi-zone event map with exactly 24 clearly labeled signs or booths distributed across the scene: "Keep Coding Keep Growing", "YO APRENDÍ EN LÍNEA", "Remote Work Zone", "ENGLISH UPGRADE YOUR FUTURE", "STARTUPS BUILD THE FUTURE", "DESIGN THINKING", "HACKATHON 24 HORAS DE IDEAS", "Café con código", "AREPAS CON TODO", "Hechas con código y ♥", "Inspiración", "Networking", "Aprendizaje", "Café", "Baños", "SOMOS LATINOAMÉRICA", "AI LAB", "DATA PEOPLE", "DEVS QUE IMPACTAN", "MARKETING GROWTH & COMMUNITY", "PRODUCT BUILD WHAT MATTERS", "FINTECH EL FUTURO DEL DINERO", "FOUNDER MODE", and "DEMO DAY LAUNCH · SCALE". In the center of the plaza, place a circular fountain with a large green geometric logo sculpture as the visual anchor. Surround it with tables, laptops, whiteboards, crowds, planters, and benches. Include a colorful hillside neighborhood in the background with mountains, palm trees, power lines, and exactly 2 red cable cars crossing the sky; also add exactly 1 small drone flying overhead. On the upper right building, place a large brand sign reading {argument name="brand name" default="Platzi"} and a green billboard that says "NUNCA PARES DE APRENDER". Populate the lower and middle foreground with many micro-scenes: a podcast booth labeled "PODCAST ON AIR", a neon "LIVE STREAM" corner, a startup workspace with people using laptops, a hackathon judging table, a founder pitch area, a fintech board with charts, and a coffee stand with espresso equipment and menu boards. Add 6 animal or mascot details across the scene: 1 orange cat lounging near the left worktables, 1 capybara at the lower left, 1 multicolor llama piñata in the lower center-left, 1 yellow rubber duck near the center-bottom, 1 small green robot near the bottom center-right, and 1 tiny turtle near the bottom beside a coin. Also place exactly 4 vehicle elements: 2 green scooters at the lower left, 1 decorated taco truck at the lower right with the sign "TACOS AL PASTOR", and 1 wheelchair user moving through the crowd. Include extra props that reinforce tech culture: whiteboards with sticky notes, a board titled "Traction" with an upward graph and bullet points "Users", "Revenue", "Retention", "Love", a board titled "CAP TABLE" with percentage rows, a Bitcoin-style coin on the ground, microphones, cameras, cables, monitors, smartphones, and branded green merchandise. Clothing should be modern casual startup attire with hoodies, jackets, backpacks, jeans, sneakers, and conference badges, featuring a diverse mix of ages and Latin American identities. Use rich greens, teals, oranges, purples, and warm neutrals, with lush plants and vines integrated into architecture. Make every corner busy and discoverable, like a Where's-Waldo-style tech ecosystem celebration, but keep the composition readable and inviting.
title: Latin American Tech Festival Poster
description: This prompt generates a dense isometric festival-style illustration of a vibrant Latin American tech conference plaza, ideal for event branding, startup community posters, or social media showcase art.

content:
An educational infographic themed "Life of {argument name="food name" default="Garlic"}."

The image must feature "a single complete food item" (such as a potato / a bunch of bananas / a head of garlic), using horizontal slicing to show the changes of the same food at different time stages, rather than a collage of multiple different items.

The main food body maintains structural continuity and consistent shape, presenting different levels of maturity in different slice areas (like time being sliced open).

The image is in vertical 3:4 ratio, with the main subject centered and horizontally expanded, evenly divided into 4-6 segments:

From left to right: Immature → Mature → Overripe → Spoiled

Each segment reflects real changes:

Color changes (green → yellow → black, etc.)
Texture changes (plump → softened → shriveled → decayed)
Feature changes (sprouting, weeping, mold, etc.)

Each stage is accompanied by text descriptions:

Stage name
Appearance characteristics
Internal changes (sugar/starch/moisture changes)
Consumption suggestions (recommended/suitable for cooking/inedible)

Design style:

Minimalist light background (beige)
Highly realistic photography style
Clear dividing lines (sense of time slicing)
Chinese educational layout, Little Red Book style
Appropriate use of icons like ⚠️✔️

Title at the top: "Life of {argument name="food name" default="Garlic"}"

Key requirement: It must be presented as "slices of the same food item changing over time," not a collage of independent individuals.
title: Food Lifecycle Infographic Prompt
description: A detailed scientific infographic prompt designed for Little Red Book style, visualizing the maturation and decay of food items through time-slices.

Simple and interesting hand-drawn illustrations or icons, such as characters or symbolic signs, are dotted on the card to enhance visual appeal and trigger readers' thinking and resonance. content: A highly realistic documentary-style close-up photo of a reinforced concrete structural beam with severe {argument name="damage type" default="shear cracking"}. The scene shows the underside of a concrete building structure, with 1 large diagonal crack running from the lower left area upward toward the upper middle-right of the beam face, 1 secondary branching diagonal crack nearby on the left-center, and 3 thinner vertical to slightly irregular hairline cracks on the right half of the beam. The concrete surface is rough, weathered, pale gray, and speckled with small pores and aggregate marks, with darker grime and age staining near the ceiling slab and beam joints. Include a supporting concrete column at the far left, the underside of the beam visible along the bottom edge, and a dim industrial background below with shadowy pipes and structural elements out of focus. Lighting is natural and subdued, like an inspection photograph taken on site under a bridge or inside a parking structure. Composition is a straight-on medium close-up centered on the damaged beam face, emphasizing authentic structural deterioration, realistic texture, engineering-inspection accuracy, and no people, no safety signs, no overlay text.
title: Realistic Cracked Concrete Beam
description: This prompt generates a realistic structural inspection-style image of a damaged concrete beam, suitable for civil engineering, infrastructure diagnostics, or educational materials.

content: A highly realistic documentary-style close-up photo of a weathered reinforced concrete bridge pier or retaining wall outdoors, showing severe alkali-silica reaction damage. The wall fills most of the frame and is viewed from a slight angle so that both the front face and the left edge are visible. The concrete surface is gray, rough, aged, and stained, covered with a dense network of large irregular polygonal map cracks with approximately 18 clearly visible major crack cells across the surface. Many cracks have pale white gel-like seepage and chalky deposits along the edges, with vertical whitish and brownish water streaks running downward from several crack intersections. Include a horizontal construction joint or base line near the bottom of the wall, darker moisture staining along the lower section, and subtle moss or algae discoloration near the edges. The setting is an overcast riverside or drainage channel environment with sparse winter vegetation, rocks at the bottom right, and a narrow strip of still water on the right edge of the image. Natural muted lighting, neutral color palette, engineering inspection photo aesthetic, sharp surface texture, no people, no tools, no text, no annotations.
title: Concrete Wall with ASR Map Cracking
description: This prompt generates a realistic civil-engineering inspection photo of alkali-silica reaction damage on an outdoor concrete structure, useful for training materials, reports, or infrastructure visualizations.

content: A hyperrealistic close-up documentary photograph of severe salt damage on a weathered concrete parapet wall in winter, shot from a low oblique angle so the wall recedes into the distance along the right side of the frame. The top coping is capped with a thin layer of snow and frost, and the lower ground surface beside the wall is dark, wet, and partially covered with slushy snow. The concrete face shows widespread scaling and spalling concentrated across the upper half, with irregular peeling patches exposing coarse aggregate stones of various sizes embedded in the mix. The damaged areas form rough, jagged, map-like shapes with crumbling edges, pitted texture, gray cement paste loss, and black and tan exposed pebbles. Vertical moisture streaks and dirty runoff stains descend toward the base of the wall. The overall palette is cold gray, charcoal, and muted winter white, with soft overcast daylight, shallow atmospheric haze in the distant background, and extremely detailed surface texture. Composition should feel like a civil engineering inspection photo, realistic smartphone or field-camera capture, no people, no text, no labels, no dramatic stylization.
title: Winter Concrete Salt Damage Close-Up
description: A photorealistic inspection-style image of salt-damaged concrete in a snowy outdoor setting, useful for civil engineering, infrastructure, or deterioration reference visuals.

content: A hyper-realistic close-up documentary photograph of severe chloride-induced corrosion damage on a reinforced concrete coastal structure, viewed from slightly below at the corner of a cantilevered beam or pier. The image shows a large spalled area at the outer corner where the concrete cover has broken away, exposing exactly 5 rusted horizontal reinforcing steel bars embedded inside the concrete. The surrounding concrete is rough, cracked, and chipped, with irregular broken edges and visible aggregate. Brown-orange rust staining runs downward from the exposed reinforcement and along the underside of the beam, indicating long-term salt damage. The concrete surface is light gray, weathered, and matte, with subtle pores and construction imperfections. In the background, place a calm blue sea and a pale blue sky with a faint distant shoreline near the horizon, softly out of focus, reinforcing the marine environment. Bright natural daylight, clear weather, realistic smartphone photo composition, no people, no tools, no safety barriers, no text, no labels, no illustration style, only a believable engineering-inspection photo of salt-damaged reinforced concrete at the seaside.
title: Coastal Reinforced Concrete Salt Damage
description: This prompt generates a realistic inspection-style photo of chloride corrosion and concrete spalling on a seaside reinforced concrete structure, useful for civil engineering visuals and infrastructure damage examples.

content: A high-angle aerial drone photograph of a modern urban transit hub in a dense mixed-use city district, captured in crisp late-afternoon sunlight with realistic architectural detail. The scene centers on a large multi-track rail station running diagonally through the frame, with 6 visible railway tracks, 2 long passenger trains at platforms, and a glass-covered station canopy near the upper middle. A broad pedestrian bridge crosses above the tracks from left to right, connecting plazas on both sides. In the lower middle is a bus interchange with 7 visible buses parked or moving through curved lanes and marked bays. Surround the station with tall contemporary residential towers, mid-rise office buildings, retail frontages, tree-lined streets, bike lanes, sidewalks, parked cars, and small groups of pedestrians. Include one prominent glass office building on the left with rooftop greenery and a visible corporate sign reading {argument name="building sign text" default="innovation"}. Add multiple green roofs and rooftop solar panels, especially on the lower-right building. Composition should feel like a clean, realistic North American transit-oriented development, viewed from an oblique bird's-eye perspective, ultra-detailed, natural colors, sharp focus, professional city-planning photography, no stylization.

content:
Please draw a brightly colored, vertical (9:16) hand-drawn style "{argument name="city name" default="Beijing"} Travel Journal Illustration." The style should look as if it were created with crayons by a curious child. Use a soft and warm light-colored background (such as light yellow), paired with bright tones like red, blue, and green, to create a cozy, child-like, and travel-inspired atmosphere.

I. Main Image: Journal-style Travel Route

Draw a "winding travel route" in the center of the illustration, connecting multiple locations with arrows and dashed lines. Recommended attractions will be automatically generated based on a {argument name="number of days" default="1"}-day itinerary:

Example format (automatically replaced with {argument name="city name" default="Beijing"} related content):

- "Stop 1: {Attraction 1 recommendation + short fun description}"
- "Stop 2: {Attraction 2 recommendation + short fun description}"
- "Stop 3: {Attraction 3 recommendation + short fun description}"
- ...
- "Final Stop: {Local signature food/souvenir + warm closing statement}"

> The number of travel stops is automatically generated based on the number of days. If no days are input, a 1-day/highlights route will be generated by default.

II. Fun Surrounding Elements (Automatically replaced based on the city)

Add plenty of child-like elements around the route, such as:

- Cute travel characters: "A child holding local snacks," "An adventurous kid wearing a backpack," etc.
- Child-like Q-version hand-drawings of local landmarks: such as "{landmark 1}," "{landmark 2}," "{landmark 3}."
- Fun signboards: "Watch out for getting lost!", "Mind the crowds!", "Good food ahead!" (Adjusted according to city context).
- Sticker-style slogans: "{argument name="city name" default="Beijing"} Travel Memories Unlocked!", "{argument name="city name" default="Beijing"} Food Adventure!", "Where to next?"
- Cute small icons of local delicacies: such as "{food 1}," "{food 2}," "{food 3}."
- Exclamations (maintaining a child-like tone): "{argument name="city name" default="Beijing"} is so much fun!", "I want to go again!"

III. Overall Style Requirements

- Hand-drawn crayon style / children's travel log style
- Bright colors, full but warm composition
- Emphasis on the joy and exploration of travel
- All text uses cute handwritten fonts
- Make the entire image look like a travel journal page full of child-like wonder.
title: Hand-drawn Travel Journal Illustration
description: A detailed prompt for creating a child-like, hand-drawn travel journal illustration with customizable city names, landmarks, and routes.

content: A humorous political meme illustration in a simple countryball cartoon style, showing the current situation at the {argument name="location label" default="호르무즈 해협"} as a narrow chokepoint. Use a wide landscape composition with bright flat colors, thick black outlines, and a clean hand-drawn infographic-like look. In the foreground, place 2 countryballs standing shoulder to shoulder on an extremely narrow sandy land bridge with rocks along both sides, making it obvious that only one can pass at a time. On the left is a {argument name="left country" default="United States"} countryball painted with the American flag, wearing black sunglasses and a brown cowboy hat, facing the other ball with a stubborn attitude. On the right is an {argument name="right country" default="Iran"} countryball painted with the Iranian flag, wearing a dark turban-like hat, with angry slanted eyes, also refusing to move. Add 2 large white speech bubbles, one beside each countryball, and put the same bold Korean word in both bubbles: {argument name="speech bubble text" default="길"}. In the midground and background, show a busy blue sea crowded with 9 ships total: 2 gray US warships on the far left, 1 Chinese submarine with a red Chinese flag, 4 oil tankers lined up in the center-left and center carrying different national flags, and 2 gray military ships near the narrow passage with small American flags. At the top right, include a large Iranian flag overlay along the coastline. Draw beige landmasses around the waterway to resemble a simplified map view of the Strait of Hormuz. At the bottom center, add a bold caption in Korean and English on the sand: {argument name="bottom caption" default="호르무즈 해협 (Hormuz Strait)"}. The mood should be satirical, tense, and meme-like, but visually cute and readable.
title: Countryball Hormuz Strait Standoff
description: This prompt generates a satirical countryball meme showing the US and Iran blocking each other at the Strait of Hormuz, useful for editorial humor or geopolitical social media posts.

content: A clean fashion comparison studio photo of 4 adult East Asian women standing side by side against a plain light gray seamless background, full body visible from head to shoes, photographed straight-on with soft diffused lighting and a polished commercial look. Above each woman, centered over her head in black serif text, place height labels reading exactly: 145cm, 155cm, 165cm, 175cm. Emphasize realistic proportional differences in height while keeping all four women slim, elegant, and similarly styled, with long dark brown to black softly wavy hair and neutral expressions. Their faces are obscured by smooth rectangular blur blocks. The women stand very close together in a friendly pose, with subtle arm contact and one woman lightly resting an arm around another. Use a coordinated beige, cream, taupe, and soft blush wardrobe palette with smart casual feminine outfits and matching ivory loafers. Woman 1 under the 145cm label wears a short-sleeve cream ribbed knit top tucked into high-waisted light beige shorts with a fabric belt, plus a small quilted shoulder bag with a chain strap. Woman 2 under the 155cm label wears a white long-sleeve blouse with a bow tie at the collar and a taupe mini skirt with a slight flared hem, carrying a small light beige crossbody handbag. Woman 3 under the 165cm label wears a sleeveless blush-beige ribbed knit top and a simple ivory mini skirt. Woman 4 under the 175cm label wears a draped white V-neck blouse with sleeves rolled to the forearms, high-waisted taupe belted shorts, and a medium taupe shoulder bag. All 4 women wear cream or ivory horsebit loafers. Composition is vertical, centered, minimal, stylish, realistic, like a fashion catalog image comparing female heights.
title: Fashion Height Comparison of Four Women
description: This prompt generates a realistic studio fashion image showing four women of different labeled heights, useful for social media comparison posts or editorial-style visual guides.

content: Create a clean premium Japanese tech infographic poster for {argument name="product name" default="Meta Quest 3"}, centered on a vertically stacked exploded view of a white mixed-reality headset floating in space against a soft lavender-to-blue gradient background. At the top, place the Meta logo in blue followed by a large bold black sans-serif headline reading {argument name="headline text" default="Meta Quest 3"}, with a smaller Japanese tagline beneath: 「まったく新しい現実を、まったく新しい構造から。」. The central subject is a highly polished 3D product render shown as an engineering breakdown with exactly 9 numbered layers, each layer separated evenly from top to bottom and labeled with blue circular number markers on the left side from 1 to 9. The 9 visible layers are: 1) the white outer faceplate shell with three front sensor/camera openings, 2) a row of exactly 3 black tracking camera modules, 3) the main logic board with chips and a clearly visible Snapdragon XR2 Gen 2 processor graphic at the center, 4) a pair of large pancake lens assemblies with vivid purple-blue glass reflections, 5) the black internal frame chassis with openings for optics, 6) the battery/electronics bar with glowing blue accents, 7) two white articulated side strap arms, 8) a white fabric head strap loop, 9) a black soft facial interface cushion at the bottom. Add rounded rectangular annotation boxes with thin white borders and subtle transparency on both sides, each connected by fine white leader lines to the corresponding layer. There are exactly 7 feature callout boxes total: 3 on the left and 4 on the right. Left side boxes, from top to bottom, read: 「Snapdragon XR2 Gen 2」 with a chip icon and smaller Japanese body text, 「調整可能なIPD機構」 with an optics adjustment icon and smaller Japanese body text, 「精密設計されたヘッドストラップ」 with a headset strap icon and smaller Japanese body text. Right side boxes, from top to bottom, read: 「フェイスプレート」 with a simple faceplate icon and smaller Japanese body text, 「トラッキングカメラ」 with a camera icon and smaller Japanese body text, 「パンケーキレンズ」 with a dual-lens icon and smaller Japanese body text, 「高性能バッテリー」 with a battery icon and smaller Japanese body text, plus a lower-right box reading 「柔らかなフェイスインターフェース」 with a soft cushion icon and smaller Japanese body text; keep the overall visual balance elegant and symmetric. At the bottom, add a wide white rounded banner spanning most of the width. On its left side place a large bold Japanese statement in blue: 「体験は、構造から進化する。」 and below it smaller Japanese explanatory copy in black. On the right side of the banner place the blue Meta logo and the wordmark “Meta”. Use a sleek Apple-like product marketing style, ultra-sharp 3D rendering, soft studio lighting, subtle glow, precise shadows, glossy plastics, realistic materials, minimal clutter, and a high-end corporate presentation aesthetic.
title: Meta Quest 3 Exploded View Poster
description: A polished Japanese product infographic showing a 9-layer exploded view of a VR headset with labeled hardware callouts, ideal for tech marketing or product presentation visuals.

content:
Create a charming hand-drawn vintage travel scrapbook poster about {argument name="city name" default="北京"}, designed as a Chinese-language illustrated tourist guide page on warm aged paper lying on a wooden tabletop. The composition is a single vertical poster with a slightly worn notebook-page look, soft stains, folded corners, tape marks, stamp-like ink smudges, and a casual collage aesthetic. At the top center, place large bold black Chinese calligraphy for {argument name="city name" default="北京"}, with the English word {argument name="english city name" default="Beijing"} underneath in loose blue brush script. Near the title, add a small red seal stamp and a short Chinese text block on the upper right describing the geographic location of the city in dark blue handwritten-style Chinese characters.

Below the title, include 4 taped polaroid-style travel photos arranged in a slightly uneven row, each with a handwritten English caption on the white border. Photo 1: the Forbidden City at sunset with golden reflections and warm orange light, captioned about warm golden tones. Photo 2: the Great Wall winding across green mountains under a bright sky, captioned about Great Wall of China landscape and green mountains. Photo 3: Beihai Park lake with willow branches, boats, and a white stupa in the background, captioned about a serene lake view. Photo 4: a traditional hutong alley with gray brick walls and hanging red lanterns, captioned about red lanterns and a charming narrow street. Use different decorative tape patterns above the photos.

Arrange the lower two-thirds like an illustrated infographic with colorful doodles and handwritten Chinese headings in red and blue. Include 5 main content sections: a geographic description block at the top right; a “best travel season” section on the left with Chinese text recommending spring and autumn, decorated with a leaf doodle and a small sun icon; a “main attractions and features” section on the left-middle listing exactly 3 items in Chinese with bullet points: Forbidden City, Badaling Great Wall, and Shichahai & hutongs, accompanied by line-art sketches of a palace pavilion, the Great Wall, hutong houses, and a small tricycle; a “must-eat foods” section on the lower left listing exactly 3 foods in Chinese with bullet points: Peking duck, zhajiangmian, and douzhi, alongside cute food illustrations of a roast duck platter, a bowl of noodles with chopsticks, and a surprised face doodle; and a “tips” section near the lower middle with exactly 2 advice lines in Chinese, each with a small icon, one about wearing comfortable shoes because attractions are large, and one about booking tickets in advance because holidays are crowded.

Add a small outline map of China near the center-right with Beijing marked by a red star and a curved arrow pointing to it. Place a traditional stone guardian lion illustration on the right side with a comic-style handwritten Chinese callout bubble saying it is super imposing. Add a highlighted recommendation box with a scalloped red outline containing exactly 2 recommended places in Chinese: Temple of Heaven Park with a note about praying for good harvests, and Nanluoguxiang; decorate this box with 2 architectural illustrations, one of the Temple of Heaven and one of a traditional gate building. At the very bottom, include a bold handwritten Chinese quote line in dark blue with red emphasis marks, plus 3 doodles beside it: a retro camera, the Bird’s Nest stadium with a small red heart, and the CCTV Headquarters building.

Overall style: cozy travel journal infographic, hand-drawn pen-and-watercolor look, slightly naive sketch style, scrapbook collage, cream paper texture, muted red and navy blue palette with soft greens and warm browns, playful but informative layout, highly legible mixed typography, clean composition, nostalgic tourism poster feel.
title: Vintage Beijing Travel Scrapbook Poster
description: This prompt generates a warm hand-drawn Beijing travel guide poster in a scrapbook infographic style, ideal for tourism artwork, educational city posters, or social media travel visuals.
