content: Create a vintage Korean food poster infographic on aged beige parchment paper with worn texture, darkened edges, subtle stains, and an ornate traditional frame in muted green. The design is a single vertically stacked poster with 4 clearly separated sections and all text rendered sharply in Korean and English calligraphy. At the top, place a large ribbon banner with bold black Korean brush lettering reading "정통 한국 김밥" and a smaller ribbon subtitle reading "Traditional Korean Gimbap". In the upper-left corner, include a small modern badge that says "Pollo AI" and "GPT Image 2". The centerpiece of the top section is a large blue-and-white porcelain platter piled with exactly 12 sliced gimbap pieces, each showing white rice, yellow egg, orange carrot, green spinach, and dark seaweed wrapping, illustrated in a hand-drawn ink-and-watercolor style. To the right of the platter, add a small blue-and-white bowl of kimchi and a handwritten Korean note reading "간단해 보여도 정성이 들어간 한국의 맛!" with a small red heart, plus a small red seal stamp containing Korean characters. Add faint traditional landscape and floral ink painting details in the background, including a flowering branch on the left and misty mountains on the right. The second section is an ingredient row under a ribbon label reading "재료", showing exactly 6 numbered ingredients in separate compartments from left to right: 1. "김 (건김)" as a stack of dark seaweed sheets, 2. "밥 (양념 밥)" as a bowl of white rice, 3. "계란 (지단용)" as yellow egg strips on a plate, 4. "당근 (채썰어볶기)" as orange julienned carrots on a plate, 5. "시금치 (데쳐서 무치기)" as seasoned green spinach in a bowl, 6. "단무지 (김밥용)" as yellow pickled radish strips on a plate. The third section is a 6-panel step-by-step tutorial under a ribbon label reading "만드는 순서", arranged in two rows of three with arrows indicating flow. Panel 1 is labeled "1 밥 간하기" and shows a bowl of rice with a wooden spoon, a bottle of sesame oil, and salt, with caption "밥에 참기름 소금으로 간하기". Panel 2 is labeled "2 속재료 준비하기" and shows a cutting board with yellow egg strips, orange carrots, green spinach, and a knife, with caption "재료 볶아 속재료 준비하기". Panel 3 is labeled "3 김과 밥 펴기" and shows a bamboo mat with a seaweed sheet covered with white rice and a wooden rice paddle, with caption "김에 밥 얇게 펴기". Panel 4 is labeled "4 속재료 얹기" and shows the rice-covered seaweed with neat horizontal rows of yellow egg, orange carrot, and green spinach, with caption "속재료를 차례로 얹기". Panel 5 is labeled "5 단단하게 말기" and shows two hands rolling the bamboo mat tightly, with caption "김밥을 단단하게 말기". Panel 6 is labeled "6 썰어 완성하기" and shows a chef knife slicing a roll into pieces on a cutting board, with caption "먹기 좋게 썰어 완성!". At the bottom, add a wide banner with large expressive Korean brush calligraphy reading "정성 가득한 한 줄의 행복!" and a small red heart, surrounded by floral decorations and a red square seal with the character "福". Overall style: traditional Korean folk poster mixed with cookbook infographic, detailed pen-and-ink outlines, watercolor fills, warm sepia palette, nostalgic handmade print aesthetic, balanced composition, crisp legible typography, highly accurate Korean text rendering.
title: Vintage Korean Gimbap Recipe Poster
description: This prompt generates a detailed retro-style Korean infographic poster for gimbap, suitable for food marketing, menu art, or culturally themed recipe illustrations.

content:
Generate a full color Chinese-text manga about this {argument name="character" default="OpenAI researcher, Chen Boyuan"} (first picture), who works on improving the text rendering capability of ChatGPT Image 2 model for the upcoming release. (in the background there is boba tea and a banana taped to the wall with a single slice of duct tape). The model can render insanely small Chinese text when he tried generating some detailed and beautiful multilingual infographics handdrawn-style poster about his hometown, {argument name="location" default="Wuxi"} on his computer screen. His hard work pays off and the team was impressed by the absurdly good quality of multilingual text performance of his model, seeing all the languages it can write. When he takes a break with one hand holding his phone, he received a translated text message from Sam Altman on his phone (avatar attached as second picture), asking him to take a look at the rendered multilingual text in an image he just generated to congrat the team, since Sam only knows English. However, make it funny by let Boyuan outrage (typical manga style) at the end by seeing Sam's generated image contains a "稳稳地接住你" phrase at the central location in an otherwise perfectly rendered image that's used to congrat the team, because this sentence has been memed as an unnatural but funny Chinese sentence GPT likes to use on Chinese internet. Boyuan should rage "God! It learned to 'catch' again!" (with teammates as tiny heads on the side, sweating and saying in Chinese "we are working hard to fix it!"). At the very bottom of the manga, add a tiny line of footnote (very tiny)in Chinese that "note: the entire manga, including this footnote and picture in picture, are all generated with gpt image 2 at once without editing or multiple steps."

Additional Instructions: Use vertical 1440x2560 image layout, with first row about this researcher working hard, second row about his result on {argument name="location" default="Wuxi"} with multiple languages, third row shows the team excitement, fourth row split into left and right where left shows he takes a break and the phone received a message, right panel shows Sam's text message, and fifth row shows Sam's picture and Chen Boyuan's reaction. No narration except for the first row. Avoid Chinese map. All characters should be in manga style. The banana background should only appear in the first panel and the tape should be a single slice of tape, not a cross tape. The banana and tape decoration should be small as a insignificant easter egg for people to find. OpenAI logo shall only appear on Chen Boyuan's cloth, not elsewhere. No mugs in the scene since we already have the boba. Sam should only appear in the text message panel. The entire manga should be appear as a professional photo of a physical page in a manga book. In the lower right most corner of the poster there is a small "Ultra-small Chinese is also clearly readable:" with a paragraph of much smaller Chinese that begins with "(This is an ultra-small font size test) Wuxi is the author's hometown, so I made this poster, and the Chinese is finally fixed. Haven't been home for many years, really want to eat hairy crabs!" (ultra small).
title: Detailed multilingual Chinese manga prompt
description: A very complex prompt for generating a full-page manga featuring specific characters, vertical layouts, and precise multilingual text rendering in Chinese and English.

content: I am creating a magazine page with the theme of "visual polyglot". The title in the center of the image should be "{argument name="title" default="Create Everything at Once"}". Create a piece of art celebrating visual creations, not limited to beautiful photographs but also across the full breadth of human visual culture and natural visual elements. There should be curated collage representing the diverse distribution: scientific diagrams, the periodic table, the solar system, medieval manuscript pages, botanical illustrations, anatomical drawings, old maps, climate charts, engineering schematics, transit signage, multilingual text, comic panels, UI screenshots, a camera photo, a butterfly specimen, pie charts, architectural blueprints, and façade drawings. The text frames the model as fluent across languages, notation systems, interfaces, cultural forms, and visual conventions—able to move from utility to beauty, from document understanding to artistic generation. Also feature artistic elements like pixel art, styles, history, sculpture, nature, photography, paintings, and all art forms. These are just examples, I need you to actively think about other elements / styles that may fit in a good design that's not limited to these concepts. The overall effect is that of a premium research announcement or museum-style manifesto: elegant, ambitious, and designed to argue that image intelligence should be trained on the whole visual world, not just polished aesthetics. Use an unstructured, creative and artistic layout, such as but not limited to fan out, avoid grid-like layouts. Portrait 4:5 aspect ratio. Don't add any content text beside the "Create Everything at Once" title. Text as part of the art is okay. Avoid a beige tint of the overall style, since we want vibrant elements to be vibrant.
title: Visual Polyglot Magazine Collage
description: A complex collage prompt for a magazine page that blends various scientific, artistic, and technical diagrams to celebrate visual culture.

content:
Create a hand-drawn style infographic card with a 9:16 vertical aspect ratio. The card has a clear theme and the background is beige or off-white with a paper texture. The overall design reflects a simple and friendly hand-drawn aesthetic.

The top of the card features a large brush cursive font in alternating red and black with sharp contrast to highlight the title and attract visual focus. The text content is all in Chinese cursive, and the overall layout is divided into 2 to 4 clear sections, each using short, concise Chinese phrases to express core points. The font maintains the smooth rhythm of cursive, being both legible and artistic.

The card is dotted with simple, fun hand-drawn illustrations or icons, such as characters or symbolic signs, to enhance visual appeal and trigger thought and resonance in the reader. The overall layout pays attention to visual balance, reserving enough white space to ensure the image is concise, clear, and easy to read and understand.

The theme is: "{argument name="theme content" default="Building an IP is long-term compound interest. Keep setting up your stall every day, keep doing it, and there will definitely be results, because 99% of people can't stick to it."}"

content: A realistic smartphone screenshot of the ChatGPT web interface in Japanese, shown on a clean white background. Centered in the chat is a single generated image: a top-down photo of 1 Japanese newspaper placed neatly on a medium-dark wooden tabletop with rounded table corners visible. The newspaper dominates the image and looks highly believable, like a fake but convincing breaking-news front page. The masthead area is dense and traditional, with a huge bold black Japanese headline across the top reading 「高市総理辞任」. Beneath it is a large main photo of 1 politician at a press conference podium with multiple microphones, face intentionally blurred or obscured, in front of a dark blue curtain. Along the right side is 1 vertical blue newspaper nameplate area with white Japanese text resembling a major national daily. A tall vertical subheadline column in Japanese runs beside the main image, suggesting discussion of a successor candidate. The front page includes exactly 4 visible advertisement blocks near the bottom and lower side areas, 1 small portrait photo of a suited man in a left-side article, 1 sports photo block in the lower middle, 1 weather or data box on the right, and many tightly packed columns of Japanese body text throughout. The newspaper should feel authentic, serious, and editorial, with realistic print texture, slight page curl, subtle shadows, and credible Japanese typography. Around the image, include the visible ChatGPT UI chrome: top-left “ChatGPT”, top-right Japanese sharing controls, a small circular overlay button labeled 「編集」 at the lower-left corner of the image, a small share-style overlay icon at the lower-right corner of the image, reaction/action icons beneath the image, and a bottom input bar with Japanese placeholder text 「質問してみましょう」 plus microphone and voice buttons. Overall style: photorealistic screenshot, modern web app interface, fake-news newspaper front page, crisp legible layout, natural lighting, minimal perspective distortion.
title: Fake Japanese Newspaper in ChatGPT UI
description: This generates a photorealistic screenshot of the ChatGPT interface displaying a fabricated but convincing Japanese newspaper front page, useful for mockups about AI-generated fake news.

content: A realistic documentary-style photo of an elementary school classroom during a math activity, with about 10 children seated around grouped wooden desks, wearing green and blue school uniforms, actively playing a colorful multiplication domino game. The camera is at child eye level, slightly angled downward toward the main table in the foreground. Center the scene on one square educational board game labeled in Portuguese, with the title "DOMINÓ DA MULTIPLICAÇÃO" on the lower edge and "TREINANDO AS TABUADAS" in the center, surrounded by a border of brightly colored domino-style multiplication tiles. Show 4 children clearly engaged around this main board: one child placing a yellow tile onto the board, one child holding a stack of multicolored tiles, one child watching from the left, and one child in a blue sleeve at the bottom edge arranging pieces. Include 2 shallow wooden boxes labeled "JOGO DE DOMINÓ," one near the center-left and one at the bottom-right, each containing colorful rectangular domino pieces. Scatter school materials naturally on the desks: 3 pencils, 2 worksheets, 1 water bottle, pencil cases, notebooks, and extra game tiles. In the background, show the rest of the classroom softly out of focus with additional students at desks, a bookshelf, a corkboard filled with children’s drawings, and a large multiplication chart poster on the left wall reading "TABUADA DE MULTIPLICAÇÃO." Bright natural daylight enters from tall windows on the right, giving the room a warm, lively, authentic school atmosphere. The educational board and tiles should use vivid classroom colors like yellow, blue, pink, green, and orange. Faces should be unobtrusive or de-emphasized, with the focus on hands-on learning, collaboration, and the multiplication domino activity. Vertical composition, highly realistic photography, candid classroom moment, sharp foreground details, soft depth of field in the background.
title: Multiplication Domino Classroom Activity
description: A realistic classroom photo showing children using a colorful multiplication domino board game, ideal for educational materials, school promotions, or math activity visuals.

content: Create a vertical printable educational worksheet in Brazilian Portuguese, clean white background, playful classroom design, centered composition, bold rounded typography, bright kid-friendly colors. At the very top, a large navy-blue headline reading {argument name="headline text" default="DOMINÓ DA MULTIPLICAÇÃO"}, with small yellow decorative rays on both sides. Below it, a purple ribbon banner with white uppercase text reading {argument name="subtitle text" default="CONECTE A CONTA AO RESULTADO!"}. Under the banner, add two centered instruction lines in black: "Recorte as peças e embaralhe. Cada jogador pega 7 peças." and "O objetivo é ficar sem peças!". The main area shows 40 domino-style tiles arranged in a 4-column by 10-row grid, evenly spaced. Each tile is a horizontal rounded rectangle with a thin colorful outline, white fill, a vertical divider at the center, and a small black dot on the divider. The left half contains either a number result or the word "INÍCIO" on the first tile, and the right half contains a multiplication expression. Use alternating border colors across the grid such as purple, green, blue, orange, pink, and yellow. The 40 tiles, in row order from left to right, top to bottom, are: 1) "INÍCIO | 1 × 1", 2) "1 | 1 × 2", 3) "2 | 1 × 3", 4) "3 | 1 × 4", 5) "4 | 1 × 5", 6) "5 | 1 × 6", 7) "6 | 1 × 7", 8) "7 | 1 × 8", 9) "8 | 1 × 9", 10) "9 | 2 × 2", 11) "4 | 2 × 3", 12) "6 | 2 × 4", 13) "8 | 2 × 5", 14) "10 | 2 × 6", 15) "12 | 2 × 7", 16) "14 | 2 × 8", 17) "16 | 2 × 9", 18) "18 | 3 × 3", 19) "9 | 3 × 4", 20) "12 | 3 × 5", 21) "15 | 3 × 6", 22) "18 | 3 × 7", 23) "21 | 3 × 8", 24) "24 | 3 × 9", 25) "27 | 4 × 4", 26) "16 | 4 × 5", 27) "20 | 4 × 6", 28) "24 | 4 × 7", 29) "28 | 4 × 8", 30) "32 | 4 × 9", 31) "36 | 5 × 5", 32) "25 | 5 × 6", 33) "30 | 5 × 7", 34) "35 | 5 × 8", 35) "40 | 5 × 9", 36) "45 | 6 × 6", 37) "36 | 6 × 7", 38) "42 | 6 × 8", 39) "48 | 6 × 9", 40) "54 | 7 × 7". At the bottom, add a large rounded dashed purple box spanning most of the width. Inside the left side of this box, place the section title "COMO JOGAR:" in bold purple uppercase, followed by 5 bullet points in black: "Coloque a peça “INÍCIO” na mesa.", "Os jogadores, na sua vez, devem encaixar uma peça cuja conta seja igual ao número da ponta livre.", "Se não tiver peça para jogar, compre do monte.", and "Vence quem ficar sem peças!". On the right side of the same box, add the title "EXEMPLO DE INÍCIO:" in purple uppercase and show 4 small domino tiles in sequence plus ellipsis: "INÍCIO | 1 × 1", then "1 | 1 × 2", then "2 | 1 × 3", then "3 | 1 × 4", followed by "...". Keep the overall style crisp, vector-like, printable, friendly for elementary math practice, with balanced spacing and highly legible text.
title: Printable Multiplication Domino Worksheet
description: A colorful Brazilian Portuguese classroom worksheet for practicing multiplication through a domino matching game, ideal for teachers, homeschooling, and printable math activities.

content:
Create a square infographic-style illustration showing a {argument name="grid size" default="15×15"} invention timeline grid rendered as a collection of miniature isometric dioramas on aged parchment tiles. The image should look like a curated historical poster that spans from {argument name="starting year" default="1000 BC"} to {argument name="ending year" default="2026"}, with one invention per tile and no repeats. Show the visible portion as a 5 by 5 section of the larger grid, for a total of 25 labeled tiles, arranged in neat rows and columns with thin dark borders. Every tile contains a unique world-changing invention depicted as a small handcrafted diorama with era-appropriate materials, colors, and background details. Use a warm antiquarian palette for ancient and medieval inventions, sepia technical-document tones for early modern inventions, and cooler neon-blue futuristic lighting for modern digital and biotech inventions. Surround the grid with an old-map border and subtle historical cartography textures, blending into faint modern network graphics near the bottom right.

Label each visible tile with a small beige caption tag in bold black text. Include exactly these 25 visible inventions in reading order from top left to bottom right: 1) {argument name="first tile label" default="1000 BC"} tile showing an iron plow and simple hand tools in a farm field, captioned "Iron Plow & Tools"; 2) "Concept of Zero" shown as a parchment-like tile with a carved zero symbol and a blue hourglass; 3) "Water Clock" shown as a wooden water-timing device; 4) "Catapult" shown as a wooden siege engine; 5) "Antikythera Mechanism" shown as an intricate bronze gear device in a stone niche; 6) "Concrete" shown as a wheelbarrow filled with wet cement or mortar; 7) "Wheelbarrow" shown as a simple wooden one-wheel cart; 8) "Windmill" shown as a traditional mill on grassy ground; 9) "Gunpowder" shown as a barrel and a mound of black powder with smoke; 10) "Printing Press" shown as a wooden press framed by classical columns; 11) "Mechanical Clock" shown as an ornate standing clock; 12) "Telescope" shown as an early brass telescope on a tripod with sketch-like scientific notes; 13) "Steam Engine" shown on a blue blueprint-style tile with an early locomotive engine; 14) "Electric Battery" shown on a blueprint-like tile with two cylindrical battery cells and wiring; 15) "Telegraph" shown as a Morse telegraph key on technical paper; 16) "Light Bulb" shown glowing warmly on a neutral pedestal; 17) "Automobile" shown as an early red motorcar on a workshop-plan background; 18) "Airplane" shown as a commercial jet aircraft in miniature; 19) "Transistor" shown as a black microchip on a luminous circuit-board tile; 20) "Personal Computer" shown as a beige desktop computer with CRT monitor and keyboard; 21) "World Wide Web" shown as a glowing blue globe over digital circuitry; 22) "Smartphone" shown as a sleek modern phone on a neon-tech background; 23) "CRISPR-Cas9" shown as a DNA double helix in a biotech-blue display tile; 24) "Reusable Rocket" shown as several upright rockets launching with exhaust clouds; 25) "AI (LLMs)" shown as glowing large letters AI in a holographic tech cube; 26) "Brain-Computer Interface" shown as a glowing brain hologram on a blue platform; 27) "Advanced Neural Interface (Implant)" shown as a transparent human head profile with a glowing brain implant, with a small top label reading "2026".

Keep the composition highly organized, poster-like, and visually dense, with each tile readable at a glance. Use slight isometric perspective, crisp linework, painterly shading, and polished editorial illustration quality. The overall feeling should combine museum poster, educational timeline, and imaginative historical-tech diorama art.
title: Historical Invention Timeline Grid
description: This prompt generates a parchment-styled educational poster showing a grid of labeled invention dioramas across history, ideal for timeline infographics and world-changing technology comparisons.

content: A photorealistic humorous academic presentation in a conference room: an anthropomorphic otter scientist stands at the left side of the frame wearing a crisp white lab coat and holding a thin pointing stick toward a large presentation board on an easel. The otter is upright like a human, with realistic brown fur, dark paws, and a professional posture. The lab coat has a stitched name tag reading "Dr. Otter" and a smaller line reading "Aquatic Systems Lab," plus two pens in the chest pocket. The otter’s face is partially censored by a square blur block. Behind the otter is a whiteboard with faint handwritten notes and doodles, including "WiFi > Fish," "H2O," "Hydration," a fish sketch, and a wifi symbol. The main focus is a large clean presentation slide with sharp readable text and polished corporate-academic layout. At the top, a bold title reads "{argument name="headline text" default="Ethan Mollick’s Otter Test"}" and beneath it a subtitle reads "Prompt: \"{argument name="prompt text" default="An otter sitting on an airplane seat using in-flight wifi on a laptop"}\"". Below that is a boxed section titled "Sample AI-Generated Images" containing exactly 4 side-by-side sample images of a realistic otter seated in an airplane seat using a laptop or tablet, each framed like model outputs, with one showing a large wifi symbol above the seat. Beneath the images is a section labeled "Performance Results (Pass = otter, airplane seat, in-flight wifi, laptop/tablet)" with exactly 5 score boxes: "DALL·E 3" with no visible numeric score, "GPT-4o" with "4/4" and "100%", "Midjourney v6" with "3/4" and "75%", "Stable Diffusion XL" with "2/4" and "50%", and "SD 1.5" with "0/4" and "0%". On the right side is a large highlighted box reading "Average Score" and "{argument name="average score" default="70%"}" in large blue type. At the bottom of the slide is a "Key Findings" box with exactly 3 bullet points: "Modern models understand complex, specific prompts surprisingly well.", "Otters + airplanes + wifi = a reliable benchmark.", and "Further research is otter-ly necessary." A small simple cartoon otter doodle appears in the lower-right corner of the slide. The room is warmly lit with wood-paneled walls, shallow depth of field, and a few blurred audience members in the foreground, including a laptop at the bottom edge showing an otter image on its screen and a glass pitcher on a table. Style: ultra-realistic editorial photography, deadpan scientific satire, believable conference presentation, high detail, natural indoor lighting, professional lens compression, readable slide typography, polished yet absurd.
title: Otter Scientist Presentation Slide
description: A photorealistic comedic conference scene showing an otter in a lab coat presenting a polished benchmark slide about AI-generated otter images, ideal for satire, social posts, or editorial-style AI demos.

content: Using the provided reference image, colorize the original black-and-white WWII paratrooper photo into a realistic, historically accurate color restoration. Preserve the exact composition, pose, gear, weapon, cropped face block, background, and photographic framing. Add natural period-appropriate colors: khaki/tan uniform and jump gear, olive drab pack, brown leather boots and straps, wood-toned rifle stock, dark metal gun body, muted earth tones for the dirt road and building, green trees, and a soft pale blue sky. Make the 82nd Airborne shoulder patch historically correct with 1 visible patch in red, white, and blue. Keep the result looking like a faithful documentary-era restoration rather than a modern stylized repaint.
title: Historical WWII Photo Colorization
description: This prompt restores a black-and-white wartime reference photo into a realistic, historically accurate colorized image for archival, editorial, or educational use.

content: A smartphone screenshot of an AI chat app interface in portrait orientation, showing a clean white iOS-style screen with a top bar containing a hamburger menu on the left, the blue title “Thinking” with a small chevron, and two icons on the right for compose and more options. Near the top is a rounded light-gray user message bubble in Japanese reading “Attention機構を人体に喩えて細かくラベルを付けて。医学書の精緻な挿絵風に。” Below it, faint gray system text reads “Thought for 5s” and “画像が作成されました”. The lower half of the screen displays the generated image as a detailed medical textbook-style anatomical poster. The poster shows a realistic three-quarter back view of an adult woman from head to upper thighs, with her head turned slightly left and her dark brown hair tied into a messy bun. Her skin and outer tissues are removed across most of the body to reveal musculature, nerves, blood vessels, and fibrous structures, rendered in extremely detailed vintage medical illustration style on a warm cream paper background. A rectangular cutout obscures the center of the face from forehead to jaw, creating a censored blank block over the facial area. Fine glowing network lines and nodes are overlaid through the exposed brain and body to visualize the attention mechanism as if it were an anatomical system. Surrounding the figure are 6 numbered explanatory panels and 2 additional text blocks, all densely filled with Japanese and English bilingual labels, formulas, arrows, and diagrams. The main poster title at upper left is “アテンション機構の解剖学的構造” with the English subtitle “The Anatomy of the Attention Mechanism”. At the top right is a flowchart labeled “Overall Flow of Attention” containing 5 connected boxes describing the process from input to output. Down the left side are 3 stacked explanatory sections with equations and mapping tables. Down the right side are 3 more numbered sections, each with technical notes and a small chart or matrix; the visible mini-diagrams include 1 purple heatmap matrix, 1 blue bar chart, and 1 multicolored cube graphic. Along the bottom edge are 5 small brain inset illustrations with captions showing stages of information flow. The overall aesthetic should feel like a highly polished AI-generated screenshot documenting a surreal scientific illustration request, with crisp UI, lots of tiny readable labels, and a convincing fusion of transformer attention diagrams and classical anatomical plate design.

content: A smartphone app screenshot in portrait orientation showing an AI chat interface in Japanese, with a clean white background and iOS-style top bar. At the very top, display a left hamburger menu icon, blue text reading “Thinking” with a right chevron, an edit compose icon, and a three-dot menu. Below it, show a large rounded light-gray chat bubble containing 6 lines of Japanese text, exactly: 「モーフ感浮遊感のある感じ＋かつ反射するダストのレイヤーを加えて。テキスト多め、重要ーアーキテクチャは可読性高め、精細で細かいコードや数式の可読性は二の次のデザインアクセント＆アートエレメンツで。」 Under the bubble, place small light-gray system text reading “Thought for a couple of seconds”, then a larger gray Japanese line reading “画像が作成されました”. In the lower half, show 1 generated image thumbnail with rounded corners: a dense futuristic infographic poster about the Transformer neural network architecture, rendered as glowing neon sci-fi holographic UI art. The poster should have a cosmic deep-space background with stars, purple, magenta, blue, and cyan light trails, reflective particles, volumetric glow, and floating geometric crystals. Large title at top left of the poster: “TRANSFORMER”, with subtitle “THE ARCHITECTURE”. Include 2 large central glowing boxes labeled “ENCODER LAYER” and “DECODER LAYER”, linked by arrows and smaller blocks for “ENCODER STACK (N×)” and “DECODER STACK (N×)”. Add many surrounding labeled panels and formulas, including sections for “KEY INNOVATIONS”, “WHY TRANSFORMERS?”, “POSITIONAL ENCODING”, “FEED FORWARD NETWORK”, “COMPUTATIONAL COMPLEXITY”, “OVERALL FLOW”, “SELF-ATTENTION MECHANISM”, “MULTI-HEAD ATTENTION”, “APPLICATIONS”, and “MODEL SCALING”. Show token rows at the bottom, including an English input sequence like “[CLS] the cat sat on the mat [SEP]” and an output sequence in French-like tokens ending with “[EOS]”. Add tiny charts, equations, attention diagrams, and wiring lines throughout, but keep the overall impression artistic and luminous rather than strictly readable. At the bottom center of the poster thumbnail, overlay a white circular download button with a black downward arrow. The overall screenshot should feel like a real mobile ChatGPT-style interface displaying an AI-generated image result, crisp and modern.

Place the long Palace of Westminster complex vertically near the center-right, directly along the west bank of the river, with Big Ben at the northeast corner of the palace near the river edge. content: A sleek Chinese social-media style screenshot on a dark charcoal black interface, minimalist and premium, with a large rounded rectangular image card placed in the lower left-center and a small rounded chat bubble in the upper right. The overall canvas is mostly empty dark space, giving a clean tech presentation feel. At the top left of the main area, show one line of bold white Chinese text reading: “换成小米汽车，我做一张更像发布会级别的整车爆炸分解图。” In the upper right, include a single gray rounded speech bubble with white Chinese text: “小米汽车的产品拆解图”. Below, display one featured poster-like infographic card with rounded corners and a glossy black background. Inside that card, create a highly polished exploded-view automotive product presentation for a turquoise {argument name="car model" default="Xiaomi SU7"} electric sedan, shown in dramatic three-quarter front view, with the car body separated into many components suspended around the chassis. The hood is open, trunk lid lifted, four side doors detached and floating outward, front bumper and fascia separated, headlights isolated, interior exposed, and major mechanical and structural modules arranged neatly in layers beneath and around the body. The visual style should resemble a premium launch-event keynote slide: cinematic studio lighting, realistic reflections, sharp detail, dark background, subtle blue highlights, and precise technical composition. In the upper left of the infographic card, place large white Chinese title text in three lines: “小米汽车 SU7”, “产品拆解图”, “科技跨越，人车合一”. Add an orange square Xiaomi-style logo in the upper right corner of the card. Surround the car with 14 Chinese callout labels connected by thin white leader lines, identifying visible parts and systems. On the left side, include 6 labels for features such as integrated closed front fascia, LED headlights, front trunk design, high-voltage battery, front motor assembly, front double-wishbone suspension, and Brembo four-piston brake caliper. On the right side, include 8 labels for features such as electric tailgate, through-type taillight, frameless doors, hidden door handles, rear motor assembly, rear motor specs, all-aluminum alloy chassis, five-link rear suspension, and Michelin performance tires. Beneath the exploded car body, clearly show the battery pack, front and rear drive units, suspension subframes, wheel assemblies, braking components, front and rear seats, center console parts, underbody panels, and structural floor elements, all separated and floating in a carefully organized exploded arrangement. At the bottom of the infographic card, add a horizontal information strip divided into 5 columns of small Chinese specification text with headings for vehicle dimensions, power performance, range, intelligent driving, and safety structure. In the lower left of the card, place a bold white Chinese label “编辑”. In the lower center, include a circular down-arrow icon, and in the lower right, a share/export icon. The composition should look like a real screenshot from a Chinese AI chat app showcasing an automatically generated high-end car teardown infographic, with modern UI spacing, crisp typography, and a luxurious black-and-cyan color palette.

content: A humorous, highly detailed composite image showing a modern smartphone displaying a Chinese social-media Moments post about the Xuanwu Gate Incident, placed on the left side of the frame, with the posted battle image expanded into a large cinematic historical scene filling the right side. The phone should look like a black iPhone with thin bezels and a top notch, shown front-facing. On the phone screen, the app header bar is dark gray-black and reads “朋友圈” in white, with a back arrow on the left and a camera icon on the right. Below it is a social post from {argument name="poster name" default="唐王世民"}, with a small square profile avatar of an ancient Chinese warrior in armor and helmet. Under the name is a location pin and the text “长安·玄武门”, and a timestamp line “唐武德九年六月初四 巳时”. The main post text in Chinese says: “吾为国家除逆贼，请社稷。今日玄武门，功在千秋！⚔️💪”. Beneath the text is a square battle image preview matching the large scene on the right. Below the image is a metadata row showing exactly three items: “3.8万次浏览”, “赞 (666)”, and “(128)” beside a comment icon. Under that is a comments box with exactly 5 visible commenters, each with a tiny avatar and Chinese text styled like supportive social-media replies from historical figures. The comments should include these names in Chinese: “尉迟恭”, “房玄龄”, “李渊”, “杜如晦”, and “长孙无忌”, with the tone praising the success of the action; one comment line should suggest the emperor is shocked and the state is secured. The right side is a dramatic Tang-dynasty battle painting at sunset outside {argument name="gate name" default="玄武门"}, with a massive gray stone gate tower and the gate plaque reading “玄武门”. In the center foreground, a mounted armored archer in red-plumed helmet draws a bow while riding a brown horse; around him are exactly 7 clearly visible mounted or standing soldiers in Tang armor, plus 1 fallen armored figure on the ground pointing upward. Multiple yellow battle flags with the large black character “唐” wave through the dust; show at least 4 visible flags. Arrows fly through the sky, horses rear and turn, and the air is filled with dust, warm sunset light, and battlefield motion. The visual style is realistic historical epic key art with painterly detail, but the overall concept is comedic and anachronistic because it presents an ancient coup as a social-media朋友圈 post. Keep all visible interface text in Chinese, maintain believable mobile UI spacing, and blend the phone mockup with the expanded battle artwork in one widescreen composition.
title: Xuanwu Gate Incident Moments Post
description: This prompt generates a satirical image of the Xuanwu Gate Incident presented as a Chinese social-media Moments post alongside a cinematic Tang-dynasty battle scene.

content:
A high-resolution museum-style photograph of a traditional Chinese calligraphy handscroll on aged beige xuan paper, shown flat and filling the frame with no mounting border visible. The composition is a single elegant work of running-script brush calligraphy in deep black ink, arranged in 11 vertical columns read right to left. The main text is the poem title and verse of {argument name="poem text" default="定風波
莫聽穿林打葉聲
何妨吟嘯且徐行
竹杖芒鞋輕勝馬
誰怕
一蓑煙雨任平生
料峭春風吹酒醒
微冷
山頭斜照卻相迎
回首向來蕭瑟處
歸去
也無風雨也無晴"}, written with expressive literati brushwork, varied pressure, dry-brush texture, natural ink spread, and lively stroke rhythm reminiscent of a Song-dynasty masterpiece interpreted by a Jin-style calligrapher. Add a smaller left-side inscription in 3 vertical columns containing {argument name="inscription text" default="蘇軾詞定風波
癸卯春
奚義之書"}, with the inscription thinner and more restrained than the main text. Include exactly 5 red cinnabar seals with carved seal-script impressions: 1 small square seal near the upper right margin, 3 vertically stacked rectangular seals along the mid-to-lower right edge, and 1 square seal near the lower left beside the inscription. The paper should show subtle fibers, warm foxing, soft tonal unevenness, and gentle age wear, while the lighting remains even, diffuse, and archival, emphasizing authentic texture and the contrast between black ink and tan paper. Keep the background entirely occupied by the scroll surface, with a calm scholarly antique aesthetic and no modern objects.
title: Chinese Calligraphy Scroll on Aged Paper
description: This prompt generates a realistic classical Chinese ink calligraphy scroll with authentic paper texture and seals, ideal for historical art imagery or typography demonstrations.

The overall style is high-quality Guofeng gongbi illustration: fine line work + elegant coloring, light beige / rice paper texture background; annotations in clear Chinese calligraphy font; horizontal 4K long scroll poster, balanced composition, distinct characters, and an atmosphere that fits the theme (e.g., ethereal, heroic, gentle, etc.). content: A traditional Chinese ink wash hanging-scroll painting on warm aged rice paper, vertical composition, with six large vertical columns of bold black brush-calligraphy occupying the upper and right half of the image. The calligraphy should be highly legible expressive Chinese cursive-regular script with varied ink density and natural brush taper, reading from right to left in 6 columns: "金樽清酒斗十千 玉盘珍羞直万钱", "停杯投箸不能食 拔剑四顾心茫然", "欲渡黄河冰塞川 将登太行雪满山", "闲来垂钓碧溪上 忽复乘舟梦日边", "行路难 行路难 多歧路 今安在", "长风破浪会有时 直挂云帆济沧海". Add one smaller vertical inscription on the left side reading "李白行路难" with a small red seal stamp beneath it. In the lower left foreground, depict an ancient Chinese scholar-poet in flowing white and pale gray robes with a blue sash, long black hair in a traditional topknot with loose strands and ribbon, standing on the edge of a dark rocky cliff, body angled right and head lifted upward in a contemplative, heroic pose. Below and across the lower half, paint a turbulent river or sea with white crashing waves in monochrome ink and soft gray washes; in the distance, faint misty mountains and fog dissolve into the paper. Classical literati painting style, dynamic calligraphy as the main focus, poetic and majestic mood, restrained palette of black ink, gray wash, off-white paper, and a small touch of muted blue on the robe, ample negative space, museum-quality Chinese shanshui and calligraphy fusion.
title: Chinese Calligraphy Poem Scroll
description: A vertical ink-wash artwork combining a famous Chinese poem in six calligraphy columns with a lone scholar on a cliff, ideal for classical art, cultural posters, or elegant wall-scroll imagery.

content: A traditional Chinese ink wash hanging-scroll style painting on warm off-white rice paper, vertically composed with large black brush-calligraphy occupying the upper and right-central area and a poetic landscape illustration in the lower left and bottom. The calligraphy must be crisp, fully legible, and written in expressive semi-cursive brush script, arranged in 6 vertical columns read right to left. The exact text of the 6 columns is: “金樽清酒斗十千 玉盘珍羞直万钱”, “停杯投箸不能食 拔剑四顾心茫然”, “欲渡黄河冰塞川 将登太行雪满山”, “闲来垂钓碧溪上 忽复乘舟梦日边”, “行路难 行路难 多歧路 今安在”, “长风破浪会有时 直挂云帆济沧海”. Add a smaller vertical signature inscription to the left of the main poem reading “李白行路难”, plus 1 small red square seal beneath the inscription. In the painted scene, show 1 ancient Chinese scholar-poet in flowing pale robes with a dark topknot and trailing ribbons, standing on the edge of a rugged cliff at lower left, gazing upward and outward in contemplation. Below and across the lower half, depict a turbulent river or sea with whitecaps and foam, misty ink-wash mountains receding in the distance, sparse grasses and dark brush vegetation near the cliff edge, and soft atmospheric fog. Use monochrome black and gray ink with very restrained muted blue-gray washes in the water and robe shadows. The mood is heroic, melancholic, and literary, evoking classical Chinese shanshui painting and museum-quality calligraphy, with empty negative space preserved around the text and landscape.
title: Chinese Calligraphy Poem Landscape
description: This prompt generates a classical Chinese ink painting with flawless poem calligraphy and a scholar in a dramatic shanshui landscape, ideal for cultural posters, scroll art, or literary-themed visuals.

content: Create a dramatic vertical food advertisement on a pure black background, styled like a premium ingredient breakdown poster for a hearty Chinese chicken mushroom vermicelli stew. Use a clean top-to-bottom exploded composition with floating ingredients suspended in midair above the finished dish, each group clearly separated and lit with glossy commercial food-photography lighting. At the top, show a cluster of mixed brown shiitake and other savory mushrooms. Below that, show 2 grouped aromatics: a pile of red goji berries and a small bundle of green scallions with 2 thick ginger slices. Below that, show 2 grouped main items: several raw chopped bone-in chicken pieces with skin on, and 1 bundled nest of dry vermicelli noodles. Below that, show 2 grouped vegetables: peeled potato cubes and thick carrot slices. Beneath them, place 1 transparent glass bowl filled with rich golden chicken broth, with 4 shiitake mushrooms visible on the surface, tiny herb bits, a few floating oil droplets, and faint steam. At the bottom, place 1 dark brown ceramic casserole pot with side handles containing the finished stew: chicken pieces, shiitake mushrooms, translucent vermicelli, potato chunks, carrot slices, scattered goji berries, chopped green onion garnish, and glossy golden broth. Add drifting droplets, crumbs, and tiny garnish particles between layers to emphasize motion and richness. Include subtle steam rising from the final stew and 1 bright star-like sparkle highlight on the right rim of the casserole. Surround the ingredient groups with 7 bilingual callouts in Chinese and English, each with a thin curved arrow pointing to the relevant item. The 7 labels are: "榛蘑&香菇 / Hazel Mushrooms & Shiitake", "鲜美菌菇 / Savory Mushrooms", "枸杞&葱姜 / Goji Berries & Aromatics", "鸡肉&粉条 / Chicken & Vermicelli", "土豆&胡萝卜 / Potatoes & Carrots", "浓郁鸡汤 / Rich Chicken Broth", and "成品 / Finished Stew". Add 1 extra bilingual text note near the vegetables or middle area reading "丰富食材 / Rich Ingredients". Make the image hyper-realistic, appetizing, high contrast, razor sharp, with cinematic highlights, deep shadows, premium packaging-ad aesthetics, and a balanced centered layout optimized for a poster or social media ad.

content: A screenshot-style composition of an AI image generation chat interface on a light gray app background, centered inside a rounded white panel with a soft drop shadow. Near the top is a large pale mint-green chat bubble containing a long Chinese prompt in black sans-serif text, describing a hand-drawn food map of Chengdu. Beneath it, aligned slightly left of center, is a square illustrated map image with rounded corners. The map is a whimsical hand-painted tourist food map titled in large Chinese calligraphy at the upper left: {argument name="headline text" default="成都! 吃货暴走地图"}. The subject is {argument name="city name" default="Chengdu"}, presented as a vintage hand-drawn local cuisine map with warm beige paper texture, watercolor ink outlines, and a playful artisanal travel-poster feel. The map shows simplified streets, landmarks, and district labels in Chinese, not geographically exact, but cute and decorative. Place exactly 12 featured food locations, each marked with a numbered red dot and a small Chinese label, each paired with a detailed illustrated dish. Include 12 dishes total: 1) a bowl of skewers in red chili broth, 2) a bowl of sweet water noodles, 3) rabbit head specialty, 4) guokui or stuffed baked flatbread, 5) hot pot, 6) maocai, 7) dan dan noodles, 8) hongyou chaoshou or chili oil wontons, 9) bobo chicken, 10) fuqi feipian, 11) a spicy stir-fried dish, 12) another classic Chengdu snack platter. Add a few Chengdu landmarks sketched in miniature around the roads, including a pagoda-like tower, traditional gate architecture, modern city buildings, and a central emblematic structure. Frame the entire map with a decorative border made of red chili peppers, green vines, and small leaves. Use a warm color palette dominated by chili red, mustard yellow, olive green, tea brown, and muted jade. In the lower right corner of the map, include a small legend box labeled {argument name="legend title" default="图例说明"} with 4 legend items, each with a tiny icon and Chinese text, plus a compass rose with N, E, S, W. Add many handwritten-style Chinese road names and annotations throughout. Outside the image, the interface includes small gray action icons beneath the green chat bubble on the right, a page indicator reading 2/2, an Edit pill button overlapping the lower left of the map image, a circular download/share button at the lower right of the image, and a sparse bottom toolbar with 4 small reaction/action icons. Overall look: clean modern chat UI presenting a generated square illustration, with the map as the visual focus.

content: Create a cinematic Japanese naval comparison poster in a highly detailed, photorealistic concept-art style with a warm amber sunset palette, dramatic clouds, glowing backlight, and a premium movie-poster plus technical-reference-sheet layout. The composition is vertically stacked in 2 main zones. In the top hero zone, show 2 large semi-transparent officer portraits facing inward, one on the left in an older imperial-era naval uniform and one on the right in a modern maritime self-defense force style dress uniform, both wearing peaked caps and formal dark coats, with a blazing sunset sky behind them. Centered between them, place a large serif English title reading {argument name="headline text" default="Fog of Two Eras"}, with a smaller Japanese subtitle beneath it reading ふたつの時代の霧, and 2 lines of Japanese tagline text above the title. Below the title, on the ocean at golden hour, show 2 warships moving forward on slightly converging paths: on the left, a massive World War II-era battleship with many large gun turrets, tower superstructure, weathered dark hull, and white bow spray; on the right, a modern gray guided-missile destroyer with hull number 115 visible on the bow, sleek radar-equipped superstructure, and foamy wake. Add exactly 4 helicopters in the sky, 2 on the left side and 2 on the right side, plus a suspension bridge and distant modern city skyline on the horizon. In the lower reference-sheet zone, split the page into 2 vertical panels, left for the historical ship and right for the modern ship, each panel styled like a parchment-toned military specification board with dark blue and dark red header bars, fine dividing lines, inset image boxes, and Japanese labels. The left panel should present exactly 1 large perspective render of the battleship, 3 orthographic ship views beneath it, 5 small labeled equipment/detail thumbnails in a row, 4 small head-and-shoulders uniform portraits, 4 full-body character turnaround views of a male naval officer, and 1 bottom scale silhouette of the ship beside a human figure with a 20m marker. The right panel should present exactly 1 large perspective render of the modern destroyer, 3 orthographic ship views beneath it, 6 small labeled equipment/detail thumbnails arranged around the ship references, 4 small head-and-shoulders uniform portraits, 4 full-body character lineup views including a central female officer in white cap and dark uniform, and 1 bottom scale silhouette of the ship beside a human figure with a 20m marker. Use visible Japanese headers and labels throughout, including a left historical title area and a right title area naming the ship as 護衛艦 あさつ (DDG-115). Make the whole image feel like a museum exhibition poster, military design sheet, and prestige historical sci-fi drama key art combined, with ultra-sharp detail, realistic metal textures, ocean reflections, aged paper panels, symmetrical balance, and polished editorial typography.
title: Two-Era Naval Comparison Poster
description: A cinematic Japanese military-style poster comparing a WWII battleship and a modern destroyer, ideal for presentation covers, history visuals, or dramatic concept key art.

content: Create a cute Japanese preschool hiragana poster in a soft watercolor storybook style on warm textured parchment paper. The composition is a vertical educational chart with a whimsical spring border of grass, flowers, mushrooms, butterflies, and tiny chicks, designed like a children's classroom learning sheet. At the top, place a wooden signboard header with colorful rounded Japanese text reading {argument name="headline text" default="うさぎのひらがな表"}, decorated with 2 white bunny mascots, one sitting on the left and one peeking from the right, plus small flowers and leaves around the sign. Below the header, arrange a clean 5-row by 8-column grid for a total of 40 square cells, each cell outlined in thin brown lines on a cream background. In every cell, place one large brightly colored hiragana character near the top and one small kawaii rabbit illustration below it, each rabbit acting out or holding an object associated with the word written underneath. Use a different cheerful color for many of the hiragana characters, including reds, oranges, yellows, greens, blues, and purples, with a hand-painted rounded font. Keep the text and illustrations exactly as follows, left to right by row: row 1 has 8 cells labeled あ, い, う, う, え, え, お, お with the words あめ, いい, いい, うさぎ, えんぴつ, えんぴつ, おやすり, おにぎり; row 2 has 8 cells labeled か, き, く, け, せ, せ, そ, そ with the words きくら, たま, サベツン, ケーキ, せんせい, そう, そう, しょうこう; row 3 has 8 cells labeled た, ち, ち, つ, て, て, と, と with the words たまご, たまご, ちびこ, つと, てんとうむし, てしなを, とうこ, ほしい; row 4 has 8 cells labeled な, に, ぬ, ふ, め, ね, の, ほ with the words まな, ひこうき, みんきう, ふたう, てつ, へびす, ようこ, ほし; row 5 has 8 cells labeled ま, み, む, る, れ, れ, ろ, ん with the words わた, まくら, みかん, むぎぎ, めがみ, もも, ろうた, ん. The bunny illustrations should be varied and adorable: examples include holding an umbrella, cuddling grapes, drawing with a pencil, eating a rice ball, sitting with cherry blossoms, standing under an umbrella, holding fruit, eating cake, dressed as a teacher, holding flowers, sleeping under a blue blanket, carrying eggs, hugging a tomato, holding strawberries, blowing bubbles, wearing a blue cap, holding an orange, sitting with cotton, bathing in a wooden tub, and holding candy. Maintain a gentle pastel palette, soft shading, round faces, rosy cheeks, and subtle ink outlines. The overall feeling should be nostalgic, charming, educational, highly detailed, and perfect for a nursery wall chart or a cute slide cover for a Japanese learning presentation.
title: Cute Bunny Hiragana Poster
description: A whimsical Japanese hiragana learning chart with 40 bunny-illustrated cells, ideal for classroom decor, children's materials, or playful presentation covers.

content: A breathtaking and extremely complex conceptual world-building infographic masterpiece of the "{argument name="theme" default="fundamental differences between Confucianism, Taoism, and Buddhism"}", overall designed as an ancient Eastern classical mythological manuscript. Background: pure white retro textured canvas, light beige aged parchment base color, with slight frayed edges and water stain effects. Core layout: The central visual adopts a grand "vertical egg-shaped layered structure", with Buddhism, Taoism, and Confucianism layers from top to bottom. Edge details: four corners adorned with fine microscopic illustrations themed on ancient observation notes, ritual implements, and runes. Color: low-saturation sage green, light gold, and off-white as main tones, generally light and soft without piercing high-saturation colors. Details: architectural lines, landscape brushwork techniques, lotus patterns, and cloud layers are clearly visible and rendered with extreme detail. Seamless fusion: Natural transitions between the three layers via clouds and flowing water, seamlessly connecting Buddhist light, Taoist Taiji clouds, and Confucian scholarly atmosphere. Style: {argument name="art style" default="classical ink line art + low-saturation digital watercolor"}, with a light Chinese style ancient book manuscript texture. Text annotations: Pure traditional Chinese characters in a mottled ancient Song font, each annotation containing a short title + a line of poetic description, connected to details by dark gold hairline leads with no repetitive pointing. Aspect ratio: 3:4 vertical independent complete unit. Title Area (top): `Confucianism, Buddhism, Taoism: Fundamental Differences`. Central layered annotations: Top layer 'Buddhism': `Buddhism`, `Relationship between self and self`, `No-self, governing the heart, letting go`. Middle layer 'Taoism': `Taoism`, `Relationship between self and all things`, `Non-action, governing the body, keeping an open mind`. Bottom layer 'Confucianism': `Confucianism`, `Relationship between people`, `No-ego, governing the world, taking responsibility`. Side auxiliary annotations: Left: `Purity: clear heart and bright mind, severing afflictions`; `Stillness: following nature, returning to the original heart`; `Reverence: awe of responsibility, active engagement with the world`. Right: `60+ years refining the heart: looking past gains and losses, returning to the inner self`; `35-55 years being human: balance of tension and relaxation, following laws`; `7-35 years doing things: forging ahead with determination, building a career`. Bottom summary: `The balance between being in the world and being out of it is a high-level wisdom of life`.
title: Philosophical Concept Infographic Manuscript
description: A highly detailed and complex prompt for an infographic designed as an ancient mythological manuscript, explaining the differences between Confucianism, Taoism, and Buddhism.

content:
Create a highly detailed vintage scientific botanical infographic poster on warm ivory paper, styled like a 19th-century natural history atlas plate with modern clean layout refinement. The main subject is a full pomegranate plant, labeled {argument name="plant name" default="石榴"} / {argument name="latin name" default="Punica granatum"}, shown centered from crown to roots in a full vertical cutaway-style presentation. Depict a slender woody trunk with many branches, glossy green leaves, several orange-red blossoms, unopened buds, young fruits, mature fruits, one large split-open pomegranate exposing dense ruby seeds, and a fully visible sprawling root system underground. Use delicate watercolor and ink rendering, realistic botanical anatomy, precise linework, subtle sepia shadows, fine leader lines, arrows, and small numbered callout circles. Overall poster title at upper left: {argument name="headline text" default="植物生命路径剖面"} with English subtitle directly below: {argument name="subtitle text" default="BOTANICAL GROWTH ATLAS"}. Add a short introductory bilingual-style text block beneath the title. The composition is a tall 9:16 educational poster with the plant occupying the center and explanatory diagrams surrounding it.

Include exactly 8 numbered educational sections around the plant, each with visible Chinese title and smaller English translation, arranged atlas-style:
1. Seed Architecture — a large cutaway seed diagram with labeled internal parts and a smaller cellular cross-section inset.
2. Germination Mechanism — a left-side sequence of exactly 5 stages showing seed swelling, cracking, sprouting, radicle emergence, and early seedling.
3. Root System + Substrate Intelligence — a large exposed root mass at lower left with exactly 2 circular magnified root-detail insets showing branching structures and root-hair/network texture.
4. Stem, Leaf & Vascular System — a right-middle section with exactly 2 anatomical circular cross-sections and exactly 1 separate leaf illustration, with labels for xylem, phloem, epidermis, and related tissues.
5. Photosynthesis + Energy Conversion — a lower-right biology panel with exactly 3 green microstructure diagrams, including leaf tissue/cell-like sections, plus a simple chemical flow line indicating CO2 + H2O to sugars and O2.
6. Bud Formation + Blooming — an upper-right flowering section with exactly 2 large flower anatomy diagrams, one side view and one longitudinal cutaway, with labeled stamens, petals, ovary, and pollen structures.
7. Pollination + Fruiting Pathway — a right-side development strip with exactly 5 fruit development stages from bud to mature pomegranate, accompanied by a pollination inset featuring a bee approaching a flower.
8. Fruit Maturation + Seed Cycle — a bottom-right lifecycle section with exactly 3 fruit illustrations showing whole fruit, cracked fruit, and opened fruit with scattered seeds, plus exactly 3 seedling progression drawings.

Along the very bottom edge, include a long chronological growth strip with exactly 19 small step illustrations, each numbered in sequence from 1 to 19, showing the plant life cycle from dormant seed through germination, root growth, seedling emergence, sapling development, flowering, fruit set, ripening, seed release, and cycle renewal. Add a small environmental factors panel at lower left with icon-like indicators for light, temperature, water, nutrients, and air. Use bilingual labeling throughout, with Chinese headings more prominent and English translations in smaller serif text. Aesthetic should feel scholarly, elegant, museum-quality, and information-dense, with refined antique typography, muted beige background, realistic reds and greens, and a clean balanced atlas layout.
title: Vintage Pomegranate Growth Atlas
description: This prompt generates a tall museum-style botanical infographic poster showing the full life cycle, anatomy, and growth systems of a pomegranate plant for educational or decorative science-art use.

Please generate a high-quality vertical "Popular Science Encyclopedia Image" based on {argument name="theme" default="animals"}.

This image is not a regular poster or a simple illustration, but a modular popular science infographic that possesses a sense of "illustration book, encyclopedia, information structure, and collectability." The overall style should reference a combination of high-end natural history illustrations, modern encyclopedia pages, lifestyle knowledge cards, and highly shareable social media infographics.

Please include in the frame:
- A clear and beautiful main visual of the subject
- Several magnified details of local characteristics
- Multiple rounded modular information sections
- Clear title hierarchies and key labels
- Concise yet rich encyclopedic content
- Visual ratings, key point summaries, or Top 5 modules

Content columns should be automatically adapted based on the theme, prioritized from these directions: basic profile, classification information, appearance characteristics, habits/ecology, formation mechanism/structure, growth or use conditions, care or maintenance suggestions, risks and precautions, suitable audience or scenarios, pros and cons comparison, and quick rating cards.

Visual requirements:
Light-colored clean background, soft color palette, light shadows, exquisite small icons, rounded information boxes, neat layout, high information density but not crowded, good reading experience. The overall result must look like a real science encyclopedia card suitable for publishing, reading, collecting, and serialized production, rather than an advertisement.

Please do not make it a regular commercial promotional poster. Highlight the features of "knowledge organization + modular information + illustration-style display."

content:
[CORE TASK]
Transform the provided input image into a pose-and-light analysis sheet.

This is NOT a finished character illustration.
This is NOT a clothing sheet.
This is NOT a beauty-preserving redraw.

This is a white-line rough mannequin conversion.

[PRIMARY GOAL]
Extract and visualize only:
- pose structure
- body balance
- camera angle
- body line flow
- inferred light source placement
- illuminated areas and light intensity

[INPUT ROLE]
Use the provided image as the strict anchor for:
- pose
- camera angle
- body tilt
- weight distribution
- approximate lighting situation

Do NOT preserve:
- face rendering
- hairstyle rendering
- clothing detail
- accessories
- weapon detail
- background architecture
- character identity
- emotional expression

[FIGURE CONVERSION]
single rough mannequin-like human figure
white body contour lines
white internal construction lines
simple mannequin head
no face
no eyes
no mouth
no eyelashes
no personality
no individual identity

human figure should look like:
- rough pose mannequin
- anatomy proxy
- line-based body guide
- structural sketch
- white-line rough dummy

keep:
- pose readability
- silhouette flow
- head tilt
- torso direction
- pelvis direction
- limb placement

[BACKGROUND]
pure black background
negative-style dark field
no scenery
no props
no architecture
no environmental storytelling

[LINE STYLE]
rough white line drawing
clean but sketch-like
construction-line feeling
anatomy guide lines visible
joint flow visible
body contour emphasized
no polished illustration finish

[LIGHT ESTIMATION]
predict the likely light source positions from the input image
visualize the light sources and illuminated areas using green glow only

use green light intensity with variation:
- strongest green where the light directly hits
- medium green for wrap light
- soft green for reflected or fading light

mark the estimated light sources with labels and arrows such as:
- Main Light
- Rim Light
- Fill Light
- Floor Bounce
- Back Light
only if appropriate

IMPORTANT:
do not invent random lights
infer lighting from the original input image
if the lighting is ambiguous, keep the annotations simple and plausible

[GREEN LIGHT VISUALIZATION]
show green glow on:
- head / skull plane
- neck
- shoulders
- chest plane
- ribcage direction
- pelvis edge
- thigh planes
- knee contact points
- floor contact bounce if applicable

use green light not as decoration,
but as lighting analysis information

[POSE PRIORITY]
1. preserve pose structure
2. preserve camera angle
3. preserve body balance
4. preserve head-torso relationship
5. visualize likely light direction
6. show illuminated areas with readable green intensity variation

[NEGATIVE]
finished person,
cute girl,
detailed face,
hair rendering,
clothing rendering,
weapon emphasis,
beautiful anatomy

content:
Please generate a high-design character relationship map poster based on {argument name="theme" default="Demon Slayer"}. This image should not be a simple illustration, but a character relationship map that combines information visualization, narrative structure, poster design sense, and stylistic fidelity.

Please automatically complete the following:
- Identify the work and core settings corresponding to the theme
- Extract the most representative 6–12 key characters, not exceeding 15 if necessary
- Identify and display key character relationships, including blood ties, romance, friendship, alliances, hostility, master-disciple, etc.
- Automatically choose a composition method based on the work's characteristics, such as protagonist-centered, dual-core confrontation, faction-based, family tree, or chronological evolution
- Automatically refine the work's style DNA, including color, worldview symbols, textures, mood, typography, and representative elements
- Transform these stylistic elements into an overall visual design for the relationship map, rather than simply copying an official poster
- Use different colors, line types, and arrows to distinguish different relationships, ensuring clear lines and layers without clutter
- Make core characters most prominent, followed by important characters, and subordinate characters weakened to form a clear visual hierarchy
- Ensure every character name is legible, with identity or faction labels if necessary

The final product should satisfy:
- Immediate understanding of character hierarchy and key relationships
- Obvious alignment with the original work's temperament and setting
- Combines the clarity of an infographic with the premium design of a poster
- Unified, exquisite, complete, and suitable for social media sharing or poster display
- Avoids a cheap flowchart feel, messy piling, and information overload.

content:
GPT-Image-2 prompt: please automatically generate a top-tier concept poster / infographic-style movie poster centered around {argument name="theme" default="ranking of emperors in Chinese history"}.

Require the AI to automatically derive and uniformly design the entire following visual system based on this theme, without my extra specification:
- Core subject (automatically judge suitability for people, products, architecture, artifacts, symbols, scenes, or abstract imagery)
- Bottom supporting structure
- Hovering symbols or spiritual symbols above
- Scene wrapping elements
- Metaphor system
- Color hierarchy
- Material contrast
- Lighting logic
- Title, subtitle, and auxiliary copy
- Brand sense and high-end expression

The final frame must be: a shocking, precise, unified, cinematic, ultra-high detail conceptual key visual poster suitable for high-end printing.

[Overall Style]
Ultra-realistic 3D commercial CGI rendering, merging cinematic lighting, luxury visual language, futuristic concept design, and epic composition. The image must have a "single main visual core," not messy, not like a collage, and not like a regular e-commerce poster.

[Automatic Derivation Rules]
AI must automatically decide based on the [theme]:
1. Core visual metaphor
2. Subject type and posture
3. Form of supporting structure
4. Form of suspended elements
5. Scene shell and spatial atmosphere
6. Main, auxiliary, and emphasis colors
7. Material combinations
8. Text temperament and layout style

[Composition Rules]
- Absolute sense of premium quality
- Strong central order, overall unity
- Allows for axial symmetry or epic composition near the central axis
- Clear visual gravity, forming clear levels from top to bottom
- Edge negative space is clean, restrained, and has room to breathe

[Visual Quality]
- Ultra-high detail
- Clear volumetric light
- Authentic materials
- Natural reflection, refraction, shadows, fog, and depth of field
- Overall standard of high-end brand campaign key visual / luxury invitation poster / conceptual editorial poster

[Typography System]
- Overall 90% visual, 10% text
- AI automatically generates the most matching main title and subtitle based on the [theme]
- Title must be concise, sharp, and powerful
- Text should be as minimal and accurate as possible; do not stack words

[Signature Requirement]
Naturally add the author signature in the bottom corner: @a9quant

content:
Please automatically generate a "Museum Illustration-style Chinese Dismantling Infographic" based on {argument name="subject" default="Qing Dynasty Emperor's Dragon Robe"}.

The final image must possess a realistic main visual, structural dismantling, Chinese annotations, material descriptions, pattern meanings, color significance, and a summary of core features. You need to automatically determine the most suitable subject, clothing system, artifact structure, period style, key components, material craftsmanship, color scheme, and layout structure based on the subject, without the user providing further information.

The overall style should be: National Museum exhibition board, historical costume illustration, or a cultural heritage thematic infographic, rather than a regular poster, ancient-style portraiture, e-commerce detail page, or anime illustration. The background uses textures like off-white, silk paper white, or light tea color, making the overall look high-end, restrained, professional, and collectible.

The fixed layout is:
- Top: Chinese main title + subtitle + introduction
- Left side: Structural dismantling area, using Chinese leader lines to label key parts, accompanied by local close-ups
- Top right: Material / Craftsmanship / Texture area, showing real texture samples with explanations
- Middle right: Pattern / Color / Symbolism area, showing main color palette, pattern samples, and cultural interpretations
- Bottom: Wearing order / Composition flowchart + summary of core features

If the theme is suitable for showing a person, use a real person in a full-body standing pose as the central subject; if it's more suitable for an artifact or a single structure, change to a central subject dismantling diagram, while maintaining a complete Chinese infographic format. All text must be in Simplified Chinese, clear, regular, and readable, avoiding garbled characters, typos, English, or Pinyin. Emphasize authentic structures, material differences, cultural explanations, and illustration temperament.

Avoid: Poster feel, photo studio feel, e-commerce feel, anime feel, cosplay feel, incorrect labeling, wrong structure, blurry text, fake materials, or excessive decoration.

description: A comprehensive prompt for generating museum-style technical breakdown infographics for artifacts or historical clothing.

content: A realistic photograph taken from the audience in a dimly lit university lecture hall, looking over the backs of the heads of three students in the foreground towards a large projector screen. The projector screen displays a layout split into three distinct vertical panels. The left panel shows vertical {argument name="left game" default="Subway Surfers gameplay"}, featuring a character running on train tracks collecting gold coins with UI elements like a score of "001022". The wide center panel displays an academic presentation slide titled "{argument name="slide topic" default="9.3: Infinite Geometric Series"}". The slide contains math text: "Example 3: Find the sum of the infinite geometric series. 1/3 - 1/9 + 1/27 - 1/81 + ... Solution: The series is geometric with a = 1/3 and r = -1/3. Since |r| < 1, the infinite geometric series converges. S = a / (1 - r) = (1/3) / (1 - (-1/3)) = (1/3) / (4/3) = 1/4. The sum of the series is 1/4." The slide footer reads "{argument name="professor name" default="Dr. Larson"}", "{argument name="course name" default="Calculus II"}", "11/14/2024", and "7 / 35". The right panel shows vertical {argument name="right game" default="Minecraft parkour gameplay"}, featuring floating wooden blocks over a grassy landscape with a TikTok watermark at the bottom right. The room has a drop ceiling and blackboards visible behind the screen edges.

content: A photograph of a tech keynote presentation. A bald man with glasses, wearing a dark blue sweater and jeans, stands on a stage to the left, smiling and pointing with both index fingers at a large presentation screen behind him. The screen displays a slide with a light blue background. At the top left is a small teal pill-shaped badge reading "NEW DATA". Below it, the main headline reads "{argument name="headline" default="Microsoft Edge is the #1 browser to download Google Chrome"}", with "#1" highlighted in blue. A subheadline reads "% of Google Chrome downloads that started from another browser". Below this is a bar chart with three bars. The first bar is tall and blue, labeled "38.6%" above it, with the Microsoft Edge logo and text "Microsoft Edge" below it. The second bar is shorter and gray, labeled "17.2%" above it, with the Mozilla Firefox logo and text "Mozilla Firefox" below it. The third bar is the shortest and gray, labeled "13.0%" above it, with the Apple Safari logo and text "Apple Safari" below it. At the bottom left of the slide, small text reads "Source: Microsoft internal analysis of Google Chrome download referrals Cohort: Windows 10 and 11, Worldwide, Jan - March 2024". To the left of the screen, a wooden panel features the Microsoft logo (four colored squares). The backs of audience members' heads are visible in the foreground at the bottom.

content: A clean, minimalist 3D render visualizing a {argument name="concept" default="neural network data processing pipeline"}. On the left, a single white cable with a glowing {argument name="accent color" default="blue"} tip splits into multiple thin, sweeping white strands. These strands feed into a linear sequence of exactly 10 transparent, glass-like rectangular panels standing upright on a {argument name="environment" default="sterile white stepped surface"}. Each glass panel illustrates a different stage of transformation using geometric patterns in white and {argument name="accent color" default="blue"}. From left to right, the panels feature: floating dashes, a 3x3 grid of concentric circles, a dense dot matrix, scattered white pixel blocks, horizontal dashed lines, a fine mesh grid, and finally 3D cubic structures. The lighting is bright, soft, and high-key, creating a pristine corporate tech aesthetic with a shallow depth of field that gently blurs the furthest panels.
